sequenceDiagram
    participant User as 사용자
    participant CLI as Copilot CLI
    participant Loader as Skill Loader (Nhe)
    participant FS as 파일 시스템
    participant Index as Semantic Index
    participant Tool as Skill 도구
    participant Model as LLM
    participant Tel as Telemetry

    Note over CLI: 세션 시작
    CLI->>Loader: loadSkills()
    Loader->>Loader: mBt() → 6-source root 목록
    loop 각 root
        Loader->>FS: SKILL.md 스캔
        FS-->>Loader: SKILL.md 파일
        Loader->>Loader: Eir() → frontmatter 파싱 + Zod 검증
        Loader->>Loader: inode/이름 중복 제거
    end
    loop .claude/commands/*.md
        Loader->>FS: *.md 스캔
        FS-->>Loader: 커맨드 파일
        Loader->>Loader: kNs() → 커맨드 파싱
    end
    Loader-->>CLI: { skills, warnings, errors }
    CLI->>Tel: skills_loaded 이벤트

    CLI->>Index: buildSkillIndex(skills)
    Note over Index: description → 시맨틱 검색 엔진

    CLI->>Tool: Skill 도구 정의에 <available_skills> 주입
    Note over Tool: 토큰 제한 렌더링 (max 15000자)

    User->>Model: "PDF를 만들어줘"
    Model->>Tool: Skill({ skill: "pdf" })
    Tool->>Tel: skill_invoked 이벤트
    Tool-->>Model: 스킬 본문 주입

    Note over CLI: 컨텍스트 한도 접근 시
    CLI->>CLI: CompactionProcessor.startBackgroundCompaction()
    CLI->>CLI: formatInvokedSkills() → <invoked_skills> 블록
    Note over CLI: 최근 스킬=전문, 이전 스킬=경로만

Main analysis

Copilot CLI skill system reverse engineering analysis

Analysis Snapshot: 151_copilot_cli/ — agent skill YAML definitions.

⚠️ Reverse engineering analysis: spawn-sync-_parse.js (line 718, entire skill loading pipeline), slash-tips-prohibited-name-description-location-skill-help-clear-skills-available.js (line 302, Skill tool definition and <available_skills> rendering), workspace-context.js (line 1197, formatInvokedSkills() context compression), skill-invocation-telemetry.js (line 83, telemetry), skill-index-builder.js (line 16, semantic search indexing), workspace-context__1025.js (ACP event schema), Based on slash-off.js (UI skill display), and definitions/*.agent.yaml (original agent definitions).

Copilot CLI's skill system is an integrated structure of 6-source skill loader + YAML agent definition + skill tool + plug-in manifest. Five declarative .agent.yaml files function as subagents, while SKILL.md-based user skills and .claude/commands/-based commands are loaded in the same pipeline and exposed to the model as <available_skills> XML blocks.

The key difference from Claude Code is that it has a completely separate schema for skills and commands, but goes through the same loading pipeline. While Codex is a meta-package with separate policy/dependency/interface, Copilot CLI concentrates everything in SKILL.md frontmatter while defining third-party extensions through the plugin manifest layer.

graph TD
    subgraph Sources["6-Source Root 해석 (mBt)"]
        P1[".github/skills/"]
        P2[".agents/skills/"]
        P3[".claude/skills/"]
        PC["$COPILOT_CONFIG/skills/"]
        PCL["~/.claude/skills/"]
        ENV["COPILOT_SKILLS_DIRS"]
        PLG["plugin.json → skills paths"]
    end

    subgraph Scopes["Source 분류"]
        P1 --> |"project/inherited"| PROJ
        P2 --> |"project/inherited"| PROJ["project"]
        P3 --> |"project/inherited"| PROJ
        PC --> |"personal-copilot"| PERS["personal"]
        PCL --> |"personal-claude"| PERS
        ENV --> |"custom"| CUST["custom"]
        PLG --> |"plugin"| PLS["plugin"]
    end

    subgraph Loading["로딩 파이프라인 (Nhe)"]
        PROJ --> SCAN["SKILL.md 스캔"]
        PERS --> SCAN
        CUST --> SCAN
        PLS --> SCAN
        SCAN --> PARSE["frontmatter 파싱 (Eir)"]
        PARSE --> DEDUP["inode 중복 제거 + 이름 중복 제거"]
    end

    subgraph Commands["커맨드 로딩"]
        CMD1[".claude/commands/*.md"] --> CMDPARSE["커맨드 파싱 (kNs)"]
        CMD2["~/.claude/commands/*.md"] --> CMDPARSE
        CMDPARSE --> DEDUP
    end

    DEDUP --> RESULT["{ skills, warnings, errors }"]

    subgraph Consumption["소비 경로"]
        RESULT --> TOOL["Skill 도구<br/>(<available_skills> 렌더링)"]
        RESULT --> IDX["시맨틱 검색 인덱싱<br/>(buildSkillIndex)"]
        RESULT --> TEL["텔레메트리<br/>(skills_loaded)"]
        RESULT --> UI["TUI 스킬 표시<br/>(/skills 커맨드)"]
    end

6-Source Skill Loading Pipeline

Root interpretation — mBt() function

The mBt() function takes the project root, custom directory, config directory, plugin path, and cwd and combines the skill root list. This function tracks the source of a skill by assigning a source field to each root.

// spawn-sync-_parse.js — mBt() (재구성)
function buildSkillRoots(projectRoot, customDirs = [], configDir, pluginRoots = [], cwd) {
  const projectRoots = [
    ...resolveProjectSkillPaths(".github", "skills", projectRoot, cwd),  // project/inherited
    ...resolveProjectSkillPaths(".agents", "skills", projectRoot, cwd),  // project/inherited
    ...resolveProjectSkillPaths(".claude", "skills", projectRoot, cwd),  // project/inherited
  ];
  const personalRoots = [
    { path: path.join(getConfigDir(configDir, "config"), "skills"), source: "personal-copilot" },
    { path: path.join(os.homedir(), ".claude", "skills"),           source: "personal-claude" },
  ];
  const customRoots = [...(process.env["COPILOT_SKILLS_DIRS"]?.split(",").filter(Boolean) ?? []), ...customDirs]
    .map(dir => dir.trim()).filter(Boolean)
    .map(dir => ({ path: dir, source: "custom" }));

  return [...projectRoots, ...personalRoots, ...pluginRoots, ...customRoots]
    .filter(root => existsSync(root.path));
}
source Meaning path Telemetry Category
project Skills in current project root .github/skills/, .agents/skills/, .claude/skills/ project
inherited Skills inherited from project parent directory Same directory pattern between cwd→home inherited
personal-copilot Copilot global personal skills $COPILOT_CONFIG/skills/ personal (summary)
personal-claude Claude Compatible Personal Skills ~/.claude/skills/ personal (summary)
plugin Skills declared in plugin manifest skills path in plugin.json plugin
custom Skills added through environment variables or CLI COPILOT_SKILLS_DIRS environment variable custom

Inheritance Exploration — fDe() (resolveProjectSkillPaths)

Browse from the project root to the upper directory of cwd and find .github/skills/, .agents/skills/, and .claude/skills/. The first hit is classified as project, the rest as inherited:

// spawn-sync-_parse.js — S7e() (재구성)
function resolveProjectSkillPaths(prefix, skillsDir, projectRoot, cwd) {
  if (cwd) {
    return walkUpDirs(cwd, skillsDir, prefix, os.homedir())
      .map((path, index) => ({
        path,
        source: index === 0 ? "project" : "inherited",
      }));
  }
  return projectRoot ? [{ path: path.join(projectRoot, prefix, skillsDir), source: "project" }] : [];
}

Skill parsing — Eir() (parseSkillFile)

For each SKILL.md, parse frontmatter and create a skill object:

// spawn-sync-_parse.js — Eir() (재구성)
async function parseSkillFile(filePath, source, pluginName, pluginVersion) {
  const content = await fs.readFile(filePath, "utf-8");
  const parsed = parseFrontmatter(content, { schema: SkillFrontmatterSchema, onUnsupportedFields: "ignore" });
  if (parsed.kind === "error") return parsed;

  const name = (parsed.value.frontmatter.name ?? deriveNameFromDir(filePath))?.replace(/\s+/g, "-");
  const description = parsed.value.frontmatter.description ?? firstThreeLines(parsed.value.body);
  const allowedTools = parsed.value.frontmatter["allowed-tools"]
    ?.split(",").map(t => t.trim()).filter(Boolean);
  const userInvocable = parsed.value.frontmatter["user-invocable"] !== false;
  const disableModelInvocation = parsed.value.frontmatter["disable-model-invocation"] === true;

  return {
    kind: "success",
    value: {
      name, description, source, filePath,
      baseDir: path.dirname(filePath),
      allowedTools, content,
      userInvocable, disableModelInvocation,
      pluginName, pluginVersion,
    },
  };
}

Deduplication

When loading, two-step deduplication is performed:

  1. inode-based: Resolve symbolic links with realpathSync(), and skip files in the same inode.
  2. Based on name: If a skill with the same name has already been loaded, ignore the later one (the one found first takes precedence)
// spawn-sync-_parse.js — Nhe() 핵심 (재구성)
const seenInodes = new Set();
const seenNames = new Set();
for (const root of roots) {
  const skillFile = path.join(root.path, "SKILL.md");
  if (existsSync(skillFile)) {
    const realpath = realpathSync(skillFile);
    if (realpath && seenInodes.has(realpath)) continue;
    const result = await parseSkillFile(skillFile, root.source, ...);
    if (result.kind === "success" && !seenNames.has(result.value.name)) {
      realpath && seenInodes.add(realpath);
      seenNames.add(result.value.name);
      skills.push(result.value);
    }
  }
}

Caching

The loading result is stored in JSON key-based memoization cache. The cache key is the JSON serialized value of projectRoot, customDirs, configDir, envSkillDirs, cwd, ​​and additionalSourcePaths. When iG()(clearCache) is called, the generation counter is incremented and the cache is invalidated.

SKILL.md Frontmatter schema

The Copilot CLI's SKILL.md frontmatter schema is strictly defined in Zod:

// spawn-sync-_parse.js — cBt (SkillFrontmatterSchema, 재구성)
const SkillFrontmatterSchema = z.object({
  name: z.string().trim()
    .regex(/^[a-zA-Z0-9][a-zA-Z0-9._\- ]*$/)
    .max(64, "Skill name must be at most 64 characters")
    .optional(),
  description: z.string()
    .max(1024, "Skill description must be at most 1024 characters")
    .optional(),
  "allowed-tools": z.union([z.string(), z.array(z.string())])
    .transform(v => Array.isArray(v) ? v.join(", ") : v)
    .optional(),
  "user-invocable": z.boolean().optional().default(true),
  "disable-model-invocation": z.boolean().optional().default(false),
});
field Type default Description
name string (max 64) Parent directory name Skill name, spaces are replaced with -
description string (max 1024) First 3 lines of body (maximum 1024 characters) Skill Description
allowed-tools string | string[] None List of Auto Approval Tools
user-invocable boolean true Whether direct user call is possible
disable-model-invocation boolean false Block skill tool calls from models

allowed-tools normalization

The allowed-tools value is normalized via the tools alias table:

// slash-tips-prohibited-name-description-location-skill-help-clear-skills-available.js — Har (재구성)
const TOOL_ALIASES = {
  bash:          { kind: "shell", argument: null },
  shell:         { kind: "shell", argument: null },
  write:         { kind: "write", argument: null },
  edit:          { kind: "write", argument: null },
  create:        { kind: "write", argument: null },
  memory:        { kind: "memory", argument: null },
  store_memory:  { kind: "memory", argument: null },
  // 다음은 read-only이므로 규칙 없이 무시됨
  read: null, view: null, glob: null, grep: null, ls: null,
  task: null, webfetch: null, web_fetch: null, websearch: null, web_search: null,
};

edit is normalized to write, bash to shell, and read-only tools such as read/view/glob/grep are implicitly allowed without rules. Parenthesized formal arguments are also supported: shell(mkdir), write(/path/to/file).

Command schema

The .claude/commands/*.md files use a separate schema, and are marked with isCommand: true and user-invocable is always true:

// spawn-sync-_parse.js — IBt (CommandFrontmatterSchema, 재구성)
const CommandFrontmatterSchema = z.object({
  name: z.string().trim().regex(/^[a-zA-Z0-9][a-zA-Z0-9._\- ]*$/).max(64).optional(),
  description: z.string().max(1024).optional(),
  "allowed-tools": /* 동일 */,
  "disable-model-invocation": z.boolean().optional().default(false),
  // user-invocable 없음 — 커맨드는 항상 사용자 호출 가능
});

Skill tool — Path through which the model calls the skill

Tool definition (Yar)

The skill tool's description contains the <skills_instructions> and <available_skills> XML blocks:

// slash-tips-prohibited-name-description-location-skill-help-clear-skills-available.js — Yar() (재구성)
function buildSkillToolDescription(skills) {
  return `Execute a skill within the main conversation

<skills_instructions>
When users ask you to perform tasks, check if any of the available skills below can help...

Important:
- When a skill is relevant, you must invoke this tool IMMEDIATELY as your first action
- When a skill matches the user's request, this is a BLOCKING REQUIREMENT:
  invoke the relevant Skill tool BEFORE generating any other response
- NEVER just announce or mention a skill in your text response without actually calling this tool
- Only use skills listed in <available_skills> below unless the user explicitly requests a skill by name
- If the user explicitly asks to invoke a skill by name that is not listed, invoke it anyway
- Do not invoke a skill that is already running
- Do not use this tool for built-in CLI commands (like /help, /clear, etc.)
</skills_instructions>

<available_skills>
${renderSkillCatalog(skills)}
</available_skills>`;
}

Token-limited rendering — JZs()

The <available_skills> block applies a character limit (default 15,000 characters, adjusted with the SKILL_CHAR_BUDGET environment variable):

// slash-tips-prohibited-name-description-location-skill-help-clear-skills-available.js — JZs() (재구성)
function renderSkillCatalog(skills) {
  if (skills.length === 0) return "No skills available.";
  const maxChars = getSkillCharBudget();  // 기본 15000
  let rendered = [], charCount = 0;
  for (const skill of skills) {
    const xml = renderSingleSkill(skill);
    if (charCount + xml.length + 1 > maxChars) break;
    charCount += xml.length + 1;
    rendered.push(xml);
  }
  const overflow = skills.length > rendered.length
    ? `\n<!-- Showing ${rendered.length} of ${skills.length} skills due to token limits -->`
    : "";
  return rendered.join("\n") + overflow;
}

Individual skill rendering — TZs()

<skill>
  <name>pdf</name>
  <description>Read, create, edit, and review PDF files</description>
  <location>project</location>  <!-- source → "project" | "user" | "plugin" | "custom" -->
</skill>

source is simplified to the yir() function: project/inherited → "project", personal-copilot/personal-claude → "user", plugin → "plugin", custom → "custom".

Semantic Search Indexing

The buildSkillIndex() function registers the skill description with the semantic search engine:

// skill-index-builder.js (재구성)
async function buildSkillIndex(searchEngine, skills) {
  const entries = [];
  for (const skill of skills) {
    if (skill.description?.trim().length > 0) {
      entries.push({
        id: `skill:${skill.name}`,
        text: skill.description,
        metadata: { source: "skill", toolName: skill.name },
      });
    }
  }
  if (entries.length > 0) await searchEngine.addEntries(entries);
}

Thanks to this indexing, when a user enters natural language such as “PDF conversion,” related skills can be found based on semantic similarity to the skill description. This function is a unique function of Copilot CLI that is not found anywhere in Codex/Gemini CLI/OpenCode/Claude Code.

Preserve skills when compressing context — formatInvokedSkills()

When the context approaches the model token limit, CompactionProcessor summarizes the conversation. At this time, the active skills are specially preserved:

// workspace-context.js — HZs()/formatInvokedSkills() (재구성)
function formatInvokedSkills(skills) {
  if (!skills || skills.length === 0) return "";
  const latest = skills[skills.length - 1];   // 최근 스킬: 전문 포함
  const previous = skills.slice(0, -1);        // 이전 스킬: 경로만

  const lines = [];
  lines.push(`## Most recent skill: ${latest.name}`);
  lines.push(`Path: ${latest.path}`);
  lines.push("");
  lines.push("Continue to follow these instructions:");
  lines.push("");
  lines.push(latest.content);

  if (previous.length > 0) {
    lines.push("");
    lines.push("## Previously used skills");
    lines.push("These skills were used earlier in the session. Re-read the skill file if you need to reactivate one:");
    for (const skill of previous) {
      lines.push(`- ${skill.name}: ${skill.path}`);
    }
  }
  return `\n\n<invoked_skills>\n${lines.join("\n")}\n</invoked_skills>`;
}

CompactionProcessor receives the getInvokedSkills callback from the constructor and inserts a <invoked_skills> block into the compressed summary message. The full text of only the most recent skills is preserved, and only the name and path of previous skills remain. This exactly matches the same pattern in Claude Code.

Telemetry events

skill_invoked — When skill is invoked

// skill-invocation-telemetry.js — buildSkillInvokedEvent() (재구성)
{
  kind: "skill_invoked",
  properties: {
    event_id: event.id,
    skill_name_hash: hashValue(event.data.name),  // 해시된 이름
    has_allowed_tools: String(hasAllowedTools),
  },
  restrictedProperties: {
    skill_name: event.data.name,       // 원본 이름 (restricted)
    skill_path: event.data.path,
    plugin_name: event.data.pluginName,
    plugin_version: event.data.pluginVersion,
  },
  metrics: {
    skill_content_length: event.data.content.length,
    allowed_tools_count: event.data.allowedTools?.length ?? 0,
  },
}

skills_loaded — When all skills are loaded

// skill-invocation-telemetry.js — buildSkillSummaryEvent() (재구성)
{
  kind: "skills_loaded",
  metrics: {
    total_skill_count: skills.length,
    project_skill_count: sourceCount["project"],
    inherited_skill_count: sourceCount["inherited"],
    personal_skill_count: sourceCount["personal-copilot"] + sourceCount["personal-claude"],
    plugin_skill_count: sourceCount["plugin"],
    custom_skill_count: sourceCount["custom"],
    command_count: commandCount,              // isCommand === true 개수
    user_invocable_count: userInvocableCount,
    model_invocation_disabled_count: modelDisabledCount,
    skill_error_count: errors.length,
    skill_warning_count: warnings.length,
  },
  restrictedProperties: {
    skill_details: JSON.stringify(skills.map(s => ({
      name, description, source, filePath,
      pluginName, pluginVersion, allowedTools,
      userInvocable, disableModelInvocation, isCommand,
    }))),
    skill_errors: JSON.stringify(errors),
    skill_warnings: JSON.stringify(warnings),
  },
}

Plugin manifest and skill integration

plugin.json schema

A plugin defines a manifest in one of .plugin/plugin.json, ./plugin.json, .github/plugin/plugin.json, or .claude-plugin/plugin.json:

// spawn-sync-_parse.js — TNs (Plugin Manifest Schema, 재구성)
const PluginManifest = z.object({
  name: z.string().regex(/^[a-zA-Z0-9-]+$/).max(64),
  source: PluginSource,  // github repo, url, local path, marketplace
  description: z.string().max(1024).optional(),
  version: z.string().optional(),
  author: z.object({ name: z.string(), email: z.string().email().optional(), url: z.string().url().optional() }).optional(),
  skills: PluginPathSpec,        // string | string[] | { paths, exclusive }
  commands: PluginPathSpec,
  agents: PluginPathSpec,
  hooks: z.union([z.string(), z.record(z.any())]).optional(),
  mcpServers: z.union([z.string(), z.record(z.any())]).optional(),
  lspServers: z.union([z.string(), z.record(z.any())]).optional(),
  outputStyles: z.union([z.string(), z.array(z.string())]).optional(),
  logo: z.string().optional(),
  strict: z.boolean().default(true),
});

The PluginPathSpec in the skills field supports three forms:

  • "skills" → single path
  • ["skills", "custom-skills"] → Multiple paths
  • { paths: ["skills"], exclusive: true } → If exclusive, excludes the default skills/ directory.

Path variable substitution

In the plugin internal path, ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} and ${PLUGIN_ROOT} are replaced with the plugin root absolute path. Path escape prevention: Paths outside the plugin directory after resolve() will cause an error.

Marketplace

Plugin sources support four types:

Type Format Example
github owner/repo or owner/repo:path jun/my-skill:skills
url https://... https://github.com/...
local ./path or /abs/path ./my-local-plugin
marketplace plugin-name@marketplace pdf-tools@copilot-marketplace

Agent YAML definition (subagent = skill preset)

Full agent profile

There are five .agent.yaml files, each functioning as an independent subagent:

properties Task Explore Research Code Review Configure
Model claude-haiku-4.5 claude-sonnet-4.5 claude-sonnet-4.5 claude-sonnet-4.5 claude-haiku-4.5
Tools "*" "*" "*" "*" (read only) bash,view,edit,create,glob,grep,mcp_validate,mcp_reload
Custom Instructions ❌ ❌ ❌ ❌ ❌
Environment Context ❌ ❌ ❌ ❌ ✅
Key Rules Success=1 line, Failure=Full text Code Archaeologist Verification step included Do not modify code mcp_validate required
Template variable {{cwd}} {{cwd}} — {{cwd}} {{configDir}},{{cwd}},{{mcpSchema}},{{serverNamePattern}}

YAML structure details

# 공통 구조
name: <internal-name>
displayName: <human-readable-name>
description: <skill description for model selection>
model: <model-id>
contexts:                     # 선택적, 추가 컨텍스트 주입
  - cli
tools:                        # 사용 가능한 도구
  - "*"                       # 전체 도구 또는 명시적 목록
promptParts:                  # 시스템 메시지 구성 요소 토글
  includeAISafety: true
  includeToolInstructions: true
  includeParallelToolCalling: true
  includeCustomAgentInstructions: false
  includeEnvironmentContext: false
prompt: |                     # 에이전트 전용 프롬프트
  ...

The promptParts toggle system allows selective inclusion/exclusion of components from system prompts on a per-agent basis. All five agents are set to includeCustomAgentInstructions: false, so user custom instructions are not delivered to subagents.

ACP event schema

skill.invoked

// workspace-context__1025.js — skill.invoked Zod 스키마
var skillInvoked = BaseEvent.extend({
  type: literal("skill.invoked"),
  data: object({
    name: string().describe("Name of the invoked skill"),
    path: string().describe("File path to the SKILL.md definition"),
    content: string().describe("Full content of the skill file, injected into conversation"),
    allowedTools: array(string()).optional()
      .describe("Tool names that should be auto-approved when this skill is active"),
    pluginName: string().optional().describe("Name of the plugin this skill originated from"),
    pluginVersion: string().optional().describe("Version of the plugin"),
  }),
});

subagent.selected / subagent.deselected

// workspace-context__1025.js
var subagentSelected = BaseEvent.extend({
  type: literal("subagent.selected"),
  data: object({
    agentName: string().describe("Internal name"),
    agentDisplayName: string().describe("Human-readable name"),
    tools: array(string()).nullable().describe("Available tools, or null for all"),
  }),
});

var subagentDeselected = BaseEvent.extend({
  type: literal("subagent.deselected"),
  data: object({}).describe("Empty payload; returns to default agent"),
});

session.skills_loaded

This event reports the list of skills loaded when the session is initialized (workspace-context__1025.js:3420).

Display TUI skills — /skills command

The /skills command implemented in slash-off.js displays loaded skills grouped by source:

Source display name
project Project
inherited Inherited
personal-copilot Personal (Copilot)
personal-claude Personal (Claude)
plugin Plugin
custom Custom

If there is a loading error, a list of errors is displayed along with the message "The following skills failed to load:".

Comprehensive sequence diagram

sequenceDiagram
    participant User as 사용자
    participant CLI as Copilot CLI
    participant Loader as Skill Loader (Nhe)
    participant FS as 파일 시스템
    participant Index as Semantic Index
    participant Tool as Skill 도구
    participant Model as LLM
    participant Tel as Telemetry

    Note over CLI: 세션 시작
    CLI->>Loader: loadSkills()
    Loader->>Loader: mBt() → 6-source root 목록
    loop 각 root
        Loader->>FS: SKILL.md 스캔
        FS-->>Loader: SKILL.md 파일
        Loader->>Loader: Eir() → frontmatter 파싱 + Zod 검증
        Loader->>Loader: inode/이름 중복 제거
    end
    loop .claude/commands/*.md
        Loader->>FS: *.md 스캔
        FS-->>Loader: 커맨드 파일
        Loader->>Loader: kNs() → 커맨드 파싱
    end
    Loader-->>CLI: { skills, warnings, errors }
    CLI->>Tel: skills_loaded 이벤트

    CLI->>Index: buildSkillIndex(skills)
    Note over Index: description → 시맨틱 검색 엔진

    CLI->>Tool: Skill 도구 정의에 <available_skills> 주입
    Note over Tool: 토큰 제한 렌더링 (max 15000자)

    User->>Model: "PDF를 만들어줘"
    Model->>Tool: Skill({ skill: "pdf" })
    Tool->>Tel: skill_invoked 이벤트
    Tool-->>Model: 스킬 본문 주입

    Note over CLI: 컨텍스트 한도 접근 시
    CLI->>CLI: CompactionProcessor.startBackgroundCompaction()
    CLI->>CLI: formatInvokedSkills() → <invoked_skills> 블록
    Note over CLI: 최근 스킬=전문, 이전 스킬=경로만

Comparative analysis

Unique elements of Copilot CLI skills

  1. 6-source loading: .github/skills/, .agents/skills/, .claude/skills/ 3 project paths + Copilot/Claude personal path + environment variables + plugins to support the most diverse sources
  2. Semantic search indexing: Register the description in a vector search engine to match natural language — a unique feature not found in other agents.
  3. Token limited rendering: Prevent prompt overflow by controlling size of <available_skills> with SKILL_CHAR_BUDGET
  4. Plugin Manifest: Integrate skills/commands/agents/hooks/mcpServers/lspServers with plugin.json
  5. allowed-tools alias normalization: Mapping tool aliases such as edit→write, bash→shell, etc.
  6. Inheritance navigation: Search the .github/.agents/.claude skill hierarchically from cwd → home.
  7. Integration of commands and skills: .claude/commands/*.md is loaded as isCommand: true skill

Compared to other agents

Item Copilot CLI Codex Claude Code Gemini CLI OpenCode
Number of Sources 6 4 (repo/user/system/admin) 8 (managed~MCP) 4 (builtin~workspace) 5 (external~url)
Semantic Search ✅ ❌ ❌ ❌ ❌
Token Limit SKILL_CHAR_BUDGET None None None None
Plug-in system plugin.json PluginsManager Separate plugin extension None
allowed-tools frontmatter None (separate permission) frontmatter None None
Command Integration .claude/commands/ None slash command = skill None Register slash command
Preserved when compressed Recent=Full Text, Previous=Path None Same pattern None None

List of core files

file Role
deobfuscated/src/app/session/spawn-sync-_parse.js Full skill loading pipeline: root parsing, SKILL.md parsing, command parsing, deduplication, caching, plugin manifest
deobfuscated/src/app/session/slash-tips-prohibited-name-description-location-skill-help-clear-skills-available.js Defining skill tools, rendering <available_skills>, limiting tokens, parsing allowed-tools and normalizing aliases
deobfuscated/src/app/agent/runtime/workspace-context.js formatInvokedSkills() Preserve skills when compressing context, CompactionProcessor
deobfuscated/src/app/agent/runtime/workspace-context__1025.js ACP event schema: skill.invoked, subagent.selected, subagent.deselected, session.skills_loaded
deobfuscated/src/misc/skill-invocation-telemetry.js skill_invoked, skills_loaded telemetry event builder
deobfuscated/src/misc/skill-index-builder.js buildSkillIndex() semantic search indexing
deobfuscated/src/misc/skill-status-display.js TUI SkillStatusDisplay component
deobfuscated/src/app/config/slash-off.js /skills command UI, grouping display by source
npm-package/definitions/*.agent.yaml Definition of 5 subagents (Task, Explore, Research, Code Review, Configure)

Previous article: [[03_cp_tool]] Next article: [[05_cp_subagent]]

snapshot_to_current delta

Area Snapshot Current
Skill format SKILL.md conventions cited in-body Marketplace/bundled skill sets evolve per release
Invocation Documented execution path Host API drift for meta-harnesses

Change history

  • 2026-03-26: Initial writing. Agent YAML definition and ACP event schema driven.
  • 2026-03-26: Advanced reverse engineering. 6-source loading pipeline based on spawn-sync-_parse.js, SKILL.md/Command frontmatter Zod schema, inode+name deduplication, caching, semantic search indexing, token-limited rendering, allowed-tools alias normalization, plugin manifest schema, skill preservation during context compression, and analysis of all telemetry events at the source code level.

Korean corpus (reference)

Verbatim KO corpus 004_skill-system/04_cp_skill.md for cross-check; code blocks unchanged.

Copilot CLI 스킬 시스템 역공학 분석

분석 스냅샷: 151_copilot_cli/ — agent skill YAML definitions.

⚠️ 역공학 분석: spawn-sync-_parse.js(718줄, 전체 스킬 로딩 파이프라인), slash-tips-prohibited-name-description-location-skill-help-clear-skills-available.js(302줄, Skill 도구 정의와 <available_skills> 렌더링), workspace-context.js(1197줄, formatInvokedSkills() 컨텍스트 압축), skill-invocation-telemetry.js(83줄, 텔레메트리), skill-index-builder.js(16줄, 시맨틱 검색 인덱싱), workspace-context__1025.js(ACP 이벤트 스키마), slash-off.js(UI 스킬 표시), 그리고 definitions/*.agent.yaml(원본 에이전트 정의)에 기반한다.

Copilot CLI의 스킬 시스템은 6-소스 스킬 로더 + YAML 에이전트 정의 + Skill 도구 + 플러그인 매니페스트가 통합된 구조다. 5개의 선언적 .agent.yaml 파일이 서브에이전트로 기능하면서, 동시에 SKILL.md 기반 사용자 스킬과 .claude/commands/ 기반 커맨드가 같은 파이프라인에서 로딩되어 <available_skills> XML 블록으로 모델에 노출된다.

Claude Code와의 핵심 차이는 스킬과 커맨드가 완전히 분리된 스키마를 갖되 같은 로딩 파이프라인을 거친다는 점이다. Codex가 policy/dependency/interface를 분리한 메타 패키지라면, Copilot CLI는 SKILL.md frontmatter에 모든 것을 집약하면서도 플러그인 매니페스트 계층을 통해 제3자 확장을 정의한다.

graph TD
    subgraph Sources["6-Source Root 해석 (mBt)"]
        P1[".github/skills/"]
        P2[".agents/skills/"]
        P3[".claude/skills/"]
        PC["$COPILOT_CONFIG/skills/"]
        PCL["~/.claude/skills/"]
        ENV["COPILOT_SKILLS_DIRS"]
        PLG["plugin.json → skills paths"]
    end

    subgraph Scopes["Source 분류"]
        P1 --> |"project/inherited"| PROJ
        P2 --> |"project/inherited"| PROJ["project"]
        P3 --> |"project/inherited"| PROJ
        PC --> |"personal-copilot"| PERS["personal"]
        PCL --> |"personal-claude"| PERS
        ENV --> |"custom"| CUST["custom"]
        PLG --> |"plugin"| PLS["plugin"]
    end

    subgraph Loading["로딩 파이프라인 (Nhe)"]
        PROJ --> SCAN["SKILL.md 스캔"]
        PERS --> SCAN
        CUST --> SCAN
        PLS --> SCAN
        SCAN --> PARSE["frontmatter 파싱 (Eir)"]
        PARSE --> DEDUP["inode 중복 제거 + 이름 중복 제거"]
    end

    subgraph Commands["커맨드 로딩"]
        CMD1[".claude/commands/*.md"] --> CMDPARSE["커맨드 파싱 (kNs)"]
        CMD2["~/.claude/commands/*.md"] --> CMDPARSE
        CMDPARSE --> DEDUP
    end

    DEDUP --> RESULT["{ skills, warnings, errors }"]

    subgraph Consumption["소비 경로"]
        RESULT --> TOOL["Skill 도구<br/>(<available_skills> 렌더링)"]
        RESULT --> IDX["시맨틱 검색 인덱싱<br/>(buildSkillIndex)"]
        RESULT --> TEL["텔레메트리<br/>(skills_loaded)"]
        RESULT --> UI["TUI 스킬 표시<br/>(/skills 커맨드)"]
    end

6-Source 스킬 로딩 파이프라인

Root 해석 — mBt() 함수

mBt() 함수가 프로젝트 루트, 커스텀 디렉터리, config 디렉터리, 플러그인 경로, cwd를 받아 스킬 루트 목록을 조합한다. 이 함수는 각 루트에 source 필드를 부여하여 스킬의 출처를 추적한다.

// spawn-sync-_parse.js — mBt() (재구성)
function buildSkillRoots(projectRoot, customDirs = [], configDir, pluginRoots = [], cwd) {
  const projectRoots = [
    ...resolveProjectSkillPaths(".github", "skills", projectRoot, cwd),  // project/inherited
    ...resolveProjectSkillPaths(".agents", "skills", projectRoot, cwd),  // project/inherited
    ...resolveProjectSkillPaths(".claude", "skills", projectRoot, cwd),  // project/inherited
  ];
  const personalRoots = [
    { path: path.join(getConfigDir(configDir, "config"), "skills"), source: "personal-copilot" },
    { path: path.join(os.homedir(), ".claude", "skills"),           source: "personal-claude" },
  ];
  const customRoots = [...(process.env["COPILOT_SKILLS_DIRS"]?.split(",").filter(Boolean) ?? []), ...customDirs]
    .map(dir => dir.trim()).filter(Boolean)
    .map(dir => ({ path: dir, source: "custom" }));

  return [...projectRoots, ...personalRoots, ...pluginRoots, ...customRoots]
    .filter(root => existsSync(root.path));
}
source 의미 경로 텔레메트리 카테고리
project 현재 프로젝트 루트의 스킬 .github/skills/, .agents/skills/, .claude/skills/ project
inherited 프로젝트 상위 디렉터리에서 상속된 스킬 cwd→home 사이의 같은 디렉터리 패턴 inherited
personal-copilot Copilot 전역 개인 스킬 $COPILOT_CONFIG/skills/ personal (합산)
personal-claude Claude 호환 개인 스킬 ~/.claude/skills/ personal (합산)
plugin 플러그인 매니페스트에서 선언된 스킬 plugin.json의 skills 경로 plugin
custom 환경변수나 CLI로 추가된 스킬 COPILOT_SKILLS_DIRS 환경변수 custom

상속 탐색 — fDe() (resolveProjectSkillPaths)

프로젝트 루트부터 cwd의 상위 디렉터리까지 탐색하며 .github/skills/, .agents/skills/, .claude/skills/를 찾는다. 첫 번째 히트는 project, 나머지는 inherited로 분류된다:

// spawn-sync-_parse.js — S7e() (재구성)
function resolveProjectSkillPaths(prefix, skillsDir, projectRoot, cwd) {
  if (cwd) {
    return walkUpDirs(cwd, skillsDir, prefix, os.homedir())
      .map((path, index) => ({
        path,
        source: index === 0 ? "project" : "inherited",
      }));
  }
  return projectRoot ? [{ path: path.join(projectRoot, prefix, skillsDir), source: "project" }] : [];
}

스킬 파싱 — Eir() (parseSkillFile)

각 SKILL.md에 대해 frontmatter를 파싱하고 스킬 객체를 생성한다:

// spawn-sync-_parse.js — Eir() (재구성)
async function parseSkillFile(filePath, source, pluginName, pluginVersion) {
  const content = await fs.readFile(filePath, "utf-8");
  const parsed = parseFrontmatter(content, { schema: SkillFrontmatterSchema, onUnsupportedFields: "ignore" });
  if (parsed.kind === "error") return parsed;

  const name = (parsed.value.frontmatter.name ?? deriveNameFromDir(filePath))?.replace(/\s+/g, "-");
  const description = parsed.value.frontmatter.description ?? firstThreeLines(parsed.value.body);
  const allowedTools = parsed.value.frontmatter["allowed-tools"]
    ?.split(",").map(t => t.trim()).filter(Boolean);
  const userInvocable = parsed.value.frontmatter["user-invocable"] !== false;
  const disableModelInvocation = parsed.value.frontmatter["disable-model-invocation"] === true;

  return {
    kind: "success",
    value: {
      name, description, source, filePath,
      baseDir: path.dirname(filePath),
      allowedTools, content,
      userInvocable, disableModelInvocation,
      pluginName, pluginVersion,
    },
  };
}

중복 제거

로딩 시 두 단계 중복 제거를 수행한다:

  1. inode 기반: realpathSync()로 심볼릭 링크를 해소하고, 같은 inode의 파일은 건너뜀
  2. 이름 기반: 같은 이름의 스킬이 이미 로딩되었으면 뒤의 것을 무시 (먼저 발견된 것이 우선)
// spawn-sync-_parse.js — Nhe() 핵심 (재구성)
const seenInodes = new Set();
const seenNames = new Set();
for (const root of roots) {
  const skillFile = path.join(root.path, "SKILL.md");
  if (existsSync(skillFile)) {
    const realpath = realpathSync(skillFile);
    if (realpath && seenInodes.has(realpath)) continue;
    const result = await parseSkillFile(skillFile, root.source, ...);
    if (result.kind === "success" && !seenNames.has(result.value.name)) {
      realpath && seenInodes.add(realpath);
      seenNames.add(result.value.name);
      skills.push(result.value);
    }
  }
}

캐싱

로딩 결과는 JSON key 기반 메모이제이션 캐시에 저장된다. 캐시 키는 projectRoot, customDirs, configDir, envSkillDirs, cwd, additionalSourcePaths 등을 JSON serialize한 값이다. iG()(clearCache) 호출 시 세대 카운터가 증가하며 캐시가 무효화된다.

SKILL.md Frontmatter 스키마

Copilot CLI의 SKILL.md frontmatter 스키마는 Zod로 엄격하게 정의된다:

// spawn-sync-_parse.js — cBt (SkillFrontmatterSchema, 재구성)
const SkillFrontmatterSchema = z.object({
  name: z.string().trim()
    .regex(/^[a-zA-Z0-9][a-zA-Z0-9._\- ]*$/)
    .max(64, "Skill name must be at most 64 characters")
    .optional(),
  description: z.string()
    .max(1024, "Skill description must be at most 1024 characters")
    .optional(),
  "allowed-tools": z.union([z.string(), z.array(z.string())])
    .transform(v => Array.isArray(v) ? v.join(", ") : v)
    .optional(),
  "user-invocable": z.boolean().optional().default(true),
  "disable-model-invocation": z.boolean().optional().default(false),
});
필드 타입 기본값 설명
name string (max 64) 부모 디렉터리명 스킬 이름, 공백은 -로 치환
description string (max 1024) 본문 첫 3줄 (max 1024자) 스킬 설명
allowed-tools string | string[] 없음 자동 승인 도구 목록
user-invocable boolean true 사용자 직접 호출 가능 여부
disable-model-invocation boolean false 모델의 Skill 도구 호출 차단

allowed-tools 정규화

allowed-tools 값은 도구 별칭(alias) 테이블을 거쳐 정규화된다:

// slash-tips-prohibited-name-description-location-skill-help-clear-skills-available.js — Har (재구성)
const TOOL_ALIASES = {
  bash:          { kind: "shell", argument: null },
  shell:         { kind: "shell", argument: null },
  write:         { kind: "write", argument: null },
  edit:          { kind: "write", argument: null },
  create:        { kind: "write", argument: null },
  memory:        { kind: "memory", argument: null },
  store_memory:  { kind: "memory", argument: null },
  // 다음은 read-only이므로 규칙 없이 무시됨
  read: null, view: null, glob: null, grep: null, ls: null,
  task: null, webfetch: null, web_fetch: null, websearch: null, web_search: null,
};

edit는 write로, bash는 shell로 정규화되고, read/view/glob/grep 등 읽기 전용 도구는 규칙 없이 묵시적 허용된다. 괄호 형식 인자도 지원된다: shell(mkdir), write(/path/to/file).

커맨드 스키마

.claude/commands/*.md 파일은 별도 스키마를 사용하며, isCommand: true로 표시되고 user-invocable은 항상 true다:

// spawn-sync-_parse.js — IBt (CommandFrontmatterSchema, 재구성)
const CommandFrontmatterSchema = z.object({
  name: z.string().trim().regex(/^[a-zA-Z0-9][a-zA-Z0-9._\- ]*$/).max(64).optional(),
  description: z.string().max(1024).optional(),
  "allowed-tools": /* 동일 */,
  "disable-model-invocation": z.boolean().optional().default(false),
  // user-invocable 없음 — 커맨드는 항상 사용자 호출 가능
});

Skill 도구 — 모델이 스킬을 호출하는 경로

도구 정의 (Yar)

Skill 도구의 description은 <skills_instructions>와 <available_skills> XML 블록을 포함한다:

// slash-tips-prohibited-name-description-location-skill-help-clear-skills-available.js — Yar() (재구성)
function buildSkillToolDescription(skills) {
  return `Execute a skill within the main conversation

<skills_instructions>
When users ask you to perform tasks, check if any of the available skills below can help...

Important:
- When a skill is relevant, you must invoke this tool IMMEDIATELY as your first action
- When a skill matches the user's request, this is a BLOCKING REQUIREMENT:
  invoke the relevant Skill tool BEFORE generating any other response
- NEVER just announce or mention a skill in your text response without actually calling this tool
- Only use skills listed in <available_skills> below unless the user explicitly requests a skill by name
- If the user explicitly asks to invoke a skill by name that is not listed, invoke it anyway
- Do not invoke a skill that is already running
- Do not use this tool for built-in CLI commands (like /help, /clear, etc.)
</skills_instructions>

<available_skills>
${renderSkillCatalog(skills)}
</available_skills>`;
}

토큰 제한 렌더링 — JZs()

<available_skills> 블록은 문자 수 제한(기본 15,000자, SKILL_CHAR_BUDGET 환경변수로 조정)을 적용한다:

// slash-tips-prohibited-name-description-location-skill-help-clear-skills-available.js — JZs() (재구성)
function renderSkillCatalog(skills) {
  if (skills.length === 0) return "No skills available.";
  const maxChars = getSkillCharBudget();  // 기본 15000
  let rendered = [], charCount = 0;
  for (const skill of skills) {
    const xml = renderSingleSkill(skill);
    if (charCount + xml.length + 1 > maxChars) break;
    charCount += xml.length + 1;
    rendered.push(xml);
  }
  const overflow = skills.length > rendered.length
    ? `\n<!-- Showing ${rendered.length} of ${skills.length} skills due to token limits -->`
    : "";
  return rendered.join("\n") + overflow;
}

개별 스킬 렌더링 — TZs()

<skill>
  <name>pdf</name>
  <description>Read, create, edit, and review PDF files</description>
  <location>project</location>  <!-- source → "project" | "user" | "plugin" | "custom" -->
</skill>

source는 yir() 함수로 단순화된다: project/inherited → "project", personal-copilot/personal-claude → "user", plugin → "plugin", custom → "custom".

시맨틱 검색 인덱싱

buildSkillIndex() 함수가 스킬 description을 시맨틱 검색 엔진에 등록한다:

// skill-index-builder.js (재구성)
async function buildSkillIndex(searchEngine, skills) {
  const entries = [];
  for (const skill of skills) {
    if (skill.description?.trim().length > 0) {
      entries.push({
        id: `skill:${skill.name}`,
        text: skill.description,
        metadata: { source: "skill", toolName: skill.name },
      });
    }
  }
  if (entries.length > 0) await searchEngine.addEntries(entries);
}

이 인덱싱 덕분에 사용자가 "PDF 변환" 같은 자연어를 입력하면, 스킬 description과의 시맨틱 유사도로 관련 스킬을 찾을 수 있다. 이 기능은 Codex/Gemini CLI/OpenCode/Claude Code 어디에도 없는 Copilot CLI 고유 기능이다.

컨텍스트 압축 시 스킬 보존 — formatInvokedSkills()

컨텍스트가 모델 토큰 한도에 접근하면 CompactionProcessor가 대화를 요약한다. 이때 활성 스킬은 특별 보존된다:

// workspace-context.js — HZs()/formatInvokedSkills() (재구성)
function formatInvokedSkills(skills) {
  if (!skills || skills.length === 0) return "";
  const latest = skills[skills.length - 1];   // 최근 스킬: 전문 포함
  const previous = skills.slice(0, -1);        // 이전 스킬: 경로만

  const lines = [];
  lines.push(`## Most recent skill: ${latest.name}`);
  lines.push(`Path: ${latest.path}`);
  lines.push("");
  lines.push("Continue to follow these instructions:");
  lines.push("");
  lines.push(latest.content);

  if (previous.length > 0) {
    lines.push("");
    lines.push("## Previously used skills");
    lines.push("These skills were used earlier in the session. Re-read the skill file if you need to reactivate one:");
    for (const skill of previous) {
      lines.push(`- ${skill.name}: ${skill.path}`);
    }
  }
  return `\n\n<invoked_skills>\n${lines.join("\n")}\n</invoked_skills>`;
}

CompactionProcessor는 getInvokedSkills 콜백을 생성자에서 받고, 압축된 요약 메시지에 <invoked_skills> 블록을 삽입한다. 최근 스킬만 전문이 보존되고, 이전 스킬은 이름과 경로만 남는다. 이는 Claude Code의 동일 패턴과 정확히 일치한다.

텔레메트리 이벤트

skill_invoked — 스킬 호출 시

// skill-invocation-telemetry.js — buildSkillInvokedEvent() (재구성)
{
  kind: "skill_invoked",
  properties: {
    event_id: event.id,
    skill_name_hash: hashValue(event.data.name),  // 해시된 이름
    has_allowed_tools: String(hasAllowedTools),
  },
  restrictedProperties: {
    skill_name: event.data.name,       // 원본 이름 (restricted)
    skill_path: event.data.path,
    plugin_name: event.data.pluginName,
    plugin_version: event.data.pluginVersion,
  },
  metrics: {
    skill_content_length: event.data.content.length,
    allowed_tools_count: event.data.allowedTools?.length ?? 0,
  },
}

skills_loaded — 스킬 전체 로딩 완료 시

// skill-invocation-telemetry.js — buildSkillSummaryEvent() (재구성)
{
  kind: "skills_loaded",
  metrics: {
    total_skill_count: skills.length,
    project_skill_count: sourceCount["project"],
    inherited_skill_count: sourceCount["inherited"],
    personal_skill_count: sourceCount["personal-copilot"] + sourceCount["personal-claude"],
    plugin_skill_count: sourceCount["plugin"],
    custom_skill_count: sourceCount["custom"],
    command_count: commandCount,              // isCommand === true 개수
    user_invocable_count: userInvocableCount,
    model_invocation_disabled_count: modelDisabledCount,
    skill_error_count: errors.length,
    skill_warning_count: warnings.length,
  },
  restrictedProperties: {
    skill_details: JSON.stringify(skills.map(s => ({
      name, description, source, filePath,
      pluginName, pluginVersion, allowedTools,
      userInvocable, disableModelInvocation, isCommand,
    }))),
    skill_errors: JSON.stringify(errors),
    skill_warnings: JSON.stringify(warnings),
  },
}

플러그인 매니페스트와 스킬 통합

plugin.json 스키마

플러그인은 .plugin/plugin.json, ./plugin.json, .github/plugin/plugin.json, .claude-plugin/plugin.json 중 하나에 매니페스트를 정의한다:

// spawn-sync-_parse.js — TNs (Plugin Manifest Schema, 재구성)
const PluginManifest = z.object({
  name: z.string().regex(/^[a-zA-Z0-9-]+$/).max(64),
  source: PluginSource,  // github repo, url, local path, marketplace
  description: z.string().max(1024).optional(),
  version: z.string().optional(),
  author: z.object({ name: z.string(), email: z.string().email().optional(), url: z.string().url().optional() }).optional(),
  skills: PluginPathSpec,        // string | string[] | { paths, exclusive }
  commands: PluginPathSpec,
  agents: PluginPathSpec,
  hooks: z.union([z.string(), z.record(z.any())]).optional(),
  mcpServers: z.union([z.string(), z.record(z.any())]).optional(),
  lspServers: z.union([z.string(), z.record(z.any())]).optional(),
  outputStyles: z.union([z.string(), z.array(z.string())]).optional(),
  logo: z.string().optional(),
  strict: z.boolean().default(true),
});

skills 필드의 PluginPathSpec는 세 가지 형태를 지원한다:

  • "skills" → 단일 경로
  • ["skills", "custom-skills"] → 복수 경로
  • { paths: ["skills"], exclusive: true } → exclusive이면 기본 skills/ 디렉터리를 제외

경로 변수 치환

플러그인 내부 경로에서 ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}와 ${PLUGIN_ROOT}가 플러그인 루트 절대 경로로 치환된다. 경로 탈출 방지: resolve() 후 플러그인 디렉터리 바깥의 경로는 에러를 발생시킨다.

마켓플레이스

플러그인 소스는 네 가지 타입을 지원한다:

타입 형식 예시
github owner/repo 또는 owner/repo:path jun/my-skill:skills
url https://... https://github.com/...
local ./path 또는 /abs/path ./my-local-plugin
marketplace plugin-name@marketplace pdf-tools@copilot-marketplace

에이전트 YAML 정의 (서브에이전트 = 스킬 프리셋)

전체 에이전트 프로파일

5개의 .agent.yaml 파일이 각각 독립 서브에이전트로 기능한다:

속성 Task Explore Research Code Review Configure
모델 claude-haiku-4.5 claude-sonnet-4.5 claude-sonnet-4.5 claude-sonnet-4.5 claude-haiku-4.5
도구 "*" "*" "*" "*" (읽기만) bash,view,edit,create,glob,grep,mcp_validate,mcp_reload
Custom Instructions ❌ ❌ ❌ ❌ ❌
Environment Context ❌ ❌ ❌ ❌ ✅
핵심 규칙 성공=1줄, 실패=전문 코드 고고학자 검증 단계 포함 코드 수정 금지 mcp_validate 필수
템플릿 변수 {{cwd}} {{cwd}} — {{cwd}} {{configDir}},{{cwd}},{{mcpSchema}},{{serverNamePattern}}

YAML 구조 상세

# 공통 구조
name: <internal-name>
displayName: <human-readable-name>
description: <skill description for model selection>
model: <model-id>
contexts:                     # 선택적, 추가 컨텍스트 주입
  - cli
tools:                        # 사용 가능한 도구
  - "*"                       # 전체 도구 또는 명시적 목록
promptParts:                  # 시스템 메시지 구성 요소 토글
  includeAISafety: true
  includeToolInstructions: true
  includeParallelToolCalling: true
  includeCustomAgentInstructions: false
  includeEnvironmentContext: false
prompt: |                     # 에이전트 전용 프롬프트
  ...

promptParts 토글 시스템은 에이전트별로 시스템 프롬프트의 구성 요소를 선택적으로 포함/제외할 수 있게 한다. 5개 에이전트 모두 includeCustomAgentInstructions: false로 설정되어 사용자 커스텀 인스트럭션이 서브에이전트에는 전달되지 않는다.

ACP 이벤트 스키마

skill.invoked

// workspace-context__1025.js — skill.invoked Zod 스키마
var skillInvoked = BaseEvent.extend({
  type: literal("skill.invoked"),
  data: object({
    name: string().describe("Name of the invoked skill"),
    path: string().describe("File path to the SKILL.md definition"),
    content: string().describe("Full content of the skill file, injected into conversation"),
    allowedTools: array(string()).optional()
      .describe("Tool names that should be auto-approved when this skill is active"),
    pluginName: string().optional().describe("Name of the plugin this skill originated from"),
    pluginVersion: string().optional().describe("Version of the plugin"),
  }),
});

subagent.selected / subagent.deselected

// workspace-context__1025.js
var subagentSelected = BaseEvent.extend({
  type: literal("subagent.selected"),
  data: object({
    agentName: string().describe("Internal name"),
    agentDisplayName: string().describe("Human-readable name"),
    tools: array(string()).nullable().describe("Available tools, or null for all"),
  }),
});

var subagentDeselected = BaseEvent.extend({
  type: literal("subagent.deselected"),
  data: object({}).describe("Empty payload; returns to default agent"),
});

session.skills_loaded

세션 초기화 시 로딩된 스킬 목록을 보고하는 이벤트다 (workspace-context__1025.js:3420).

TUI 스킬 표시 — /skills 커맨드

slash-off.js에서 구현된 /skills 커맨드는 로딩된 스킬을 source별로 그룹화하여 표시한다:

Source 표시 이름
project Project
inherited Inherited
personal-copilot Personal (Copilot)
personal-claude Personal (Claude)
plugin Plugin
custom Custom

로딩 에러가 있으면 "The following skills failed to load:" 메시지와 함께 에러 목록을 표시한다.

종합 시퀀스 다이어그램

sequenceDiagram
    participant User as 사용자
    participant CLI as Copilot CLI
    participant Loader as Skill Loader (Nhe)
    participant FS as 파일 시스템
    participant Index as Semantic Index
    participant Tool as Skill 도구
    participant Model as LLM
    participant Tel as Telemetry

    Note over CLI: 세션 시작
    CLI->>Loader: loadSkills()
    Loader->>Loader: mBt() → 6-source root 목록
    loop 각 root
        Loader->>FS: SKILL.md 스캔
        FS-->>Loader: SKILL.md 파일
        Loader->>Loader: Eir() → frontmatter 파싱 + Zod 검증
        Loader->>Loader: inode/이름 중복 제거
    end
    loop .claude/commands/*.md
        Loader->>FS: *.md 스캔
        FS-->>Loader: 커맨드 파일
        Loader->>Loader: kNs() → 커맨드 파싱
    end
    Loader-->>CLI: { skills, warnings, errors }
    CLI->>Tel: skills_loaded 이벤트

    CLI->>Index: buildSkillIndex(skills)
    Note over Index: description → 시맨틱 검색 엔진

    CLI->>Tool: Skill 도구 정의에 <available_skills> 주입
    Note over Tool: 토큰 제한 렌더링 (max 15000자)

    User->>Model: "PDF를 만들어줘"
    Model->>Tool: Skill({ skill: "pdf" })
    Tool->>Tel: skill_invoked 이벤트
    Tool-->>Model: 스킬 본문 주입

    Note over CLI: 컨텍스트 한도 접근 시
    CLI->>CLI: CompactionProcessor.startBackgroundCompaction()
    CLI->>CLI: formatInvokedSkills() → <invoked_skills> 블록
    Note over CLI: 최근 스킬=전문, 이전 스킬=경로만

비교 분석

Copilot CLI 스킬의 독창적 요소

  1. 6-source 로딩: .github/skills/, .agents/skills/, .claude/skills/ 3개 프로젝트 경로 + Copilot/Claude 개인 경로 + 환경변수 + 플러그인으로 가장 다양한 소스를 지원
  2. 시맨틱 검색 인덱싱: description을 벡터 검색 엔진에 등록하여 자연어 매칭 — 다른 에이전트에 없는 고유 기능
  3. 토큰 제한 렌더링: SKILL_CHAR_BUDGET으로 <available_skills> 크기를 제어하여 프롬프트 오버플로 방지
  4. 플러그인 매니페스트: plugin.json으로 skills/commands/agents/hooks/mcpServers/lspServers를 통합 선언
  5. allowed-tools 별칭 정규화: edit→write, bash→shell 등 도구 별칭 매핑
  6. 상속 탐색: cwd→home까지 계층적으로 .github/.agents/.claude 스킬을 탐색
  7. 커맨드와 스킬의 통합: .claude/commands/*.md가 isCommand: true 스킬로 로딩됨

다른 에이전트 대비

항목 Copilot CLI Codex Claude Code Gemini CLI OpenCode
소스 수 6 4 (repo/user/system/admin) 8 (managed~MCP) 4 (builtin~workspace) 5 (external~url)
시맨틱 검색 ✅ ❌ ❌ ❌ ❌
토큰 제한 SKILL_CHAR_BUDGET 없음 없음 없음 없음
플러그인 시스템 plugin.json PluginsManager 별도 플러그인 extension 없음
allowed-tools frontmatter 없음 (별도 permission) frontmatter 없음 없음
커맨드 통합 .claude/commands/ 없음 slash command = skill 없음 slash command 등록
압축 시 보존 최근=전문, 이전=경로 없음 동일 패턴 없음 없음

핵심 파일 목록

파일 역할
deobfuscated/src/app/session/spawn-sync-_parse.js 전체 스킬 로딩 파이프라인: root 해석, SKILL.md 파싱, 커맨드 파싱, 중복 제거, 캐싱, 플러그인 매니페스트
deobfuscated/src/app/session/slash-tips-prohibited-name-description-location-skill-help-clear-skills-available.js Skill 도구 정의, <available_skills> 렌더링, 토큰 제한, allowed-tools 파싱과 별칭 정규화

deobfuscated/src/misc/skill-status-display.js TUI SkillStatusDisplay 컴포넌트
deobfuscated/src/app/config/slash-off.js /skills 커맨드 UI, source별 그룹화 표시
npm-package/definitions/*.agent.yaml 5개 서브에이전트 정의 (Task, Explore, Research, Code Review, Configure)

snapshot_to_current 델타

Area Snapshot Current
Skill format SKILL.md conventions cited in-body Marketplace/bundled skill sets evolve per release
Invocation Documented execution path Host API drift for meta-harnesses

변경 기록

  • 2026-03-26: 초기 작성. 에이전트 YAML 정의와 ACP 이벤트 스키마 중심.
  • 2026-03-26: 역공학 심화. spawn-sync-_parse.js 기반 6-source 로딩 파이프라인, SKILL.md/Command frontmatter Zod 스키마, inode+이름 중복 제거, 캐싱, 시맨틱 검색 인덱싱, 토큰 제한 렌더링, allowed-tools 별칭 정규화, 플러그인 매니페스트 스키마, 컨텍스트 압축 시 스킬 보존, 텔레메트리 이벤트 전체를 소스 코드 수준에서 분석.
27

Axis 05: Subagents

AXIS

005_subagents-collab/05_cp_subagent.md

Overview

Axis 05: Subagents — developer-depth section from the codex corpus. Structural highlights extracted from the analysis:

  • 분석 스냅샷: 151_copilot_cli/ — subagent/collaboration dispatch.

    1. 로컬 서브에이전트 (ACP 이벤트 기반): 5개 YAML 에이전트가 subagent.started/completed/failed 이벤트로 생명주기를 관리하며, trajectory writer가 XML 태그(<subagent name="...">)로 실행 기록을 파일에 스트리밍한다.
    1. 원격 위임 (Remote Delegation): bgt 클래스(RemoteDelegationManager)가 5단계 상태 머신으로 GitHub Copilot 서버에 작업을 위임하고, PR 생성·추적·폴링까지 자동화한다.
    1. 서브에이전트 텔레메트리: 4단계 이벤트(selected, started, completed, failed)가 agent_name_hash 해시로 에이전트 이름을 익명화하여 수집된다.

  • ⚠️ 디컴파일 분석 근거: deobfuscated/src/app/core/slash-subagent.js (176줄, trajectory writer), deobfuscated/src/app/mcp/subagent-telemetry.js (60줄, 텔레메트리 빌더), deobfuscated/src/app/agent/runtime/remote-delegation.js (213,816바이트, 원격 위임 상태

  • stateDiagram-v2
  • [*] --> uncommitted_changes_check: startDelegation()
  • uncommitted_changes_check --> confirm: 변경사항 없음 / 커밋 가능
  • confirm --> processing: remote 선택 + 사용자 확인
  • processing --> tracking: 모든 operation 완료
  • tracking --> complete: 세션 종료 상태 감지
  • state processing {

    1. Subagent 텔레메트리
