// confirm_folder_trust.js — 폴더 신뢰 확인 (재구성)
function ConfirmFolderTrust({ folderPath, onConfirm }) {
  return ConfirmationDialog({
    title: "Confirm folder trust",
    body: [
      folderPath,
      "Copilot may read files in this folder. Reading untrusted files may lead Copilot to behave in unexpected ways.",
      "With your permission, Copilot may execute code or bash commands in this folder.",
      "Executing untrusted code is unsafe.",
      "Do you trust the files in this folder?"
    ],
    items: [
      { label: "Yes", value: "yes" },
      { label: "Yes, and remember this folder for future sessions", value: "remember" },
    ],
    escapeItem: { label: "No", value: "no" },
  });
}

README / docs

// 재구성된 SafetyAssessment 인터페이스
interface SafetyAssessment {
  result: "completed";
  commands: Array<{ identifier: string; readOnly: boolean }>;
  possiblePaths: string[];           // 파싱된 파일 경로
  possibleUrls: Array<{ url: string }>; // curl/wget 등의 URL
  hasWriteFileRedirection: boolean;  // > 또는 >> 포함
  canOfferSessionApproval: boolean;  // !hasPotentiallyConfusingConstructs
  hasDangerousExpansion: boolean;    // $(cmd) 또는 <(cmd) 포함
  warning?: string;                  // 파서 에러 시 메시지
}

README / docs

// terminal-base.js — PTY 터미널 (재구성)
class TerminalBase extends EventEmitter2 {
  pty;           // node-pty 인스턴스
  encoding;      // 문자 인코딩
  flowControl;   // XON/XOFF 흐름 제어

  constructor(options) {
    this.pty = spawn(options.shell, options.args, {
      name: options.termName,
      cols: options.cols || 80,
      rows: options.rows || 24,
      cwd: options.cwd,
      env: options.env,
    });

    // 흐름 제어 설정
    if (options.flowControl) {
      this.flowControl = {
        xon: "\x11",    // XON (DC1)
        xoff: "\x13",   // XOFF (DC3)
        enabled: true,
      };
    }
  }
}

README / docs

// cleanup.js — Raw mode 안전한 중첩 관리
handleSetRawMode = (enable) => {
  if (enable) {
    if (this.rawModeEnabledCount === 0) {
      stdin.ref();
      stdin.setRawMode(true);
      stdin.addListener("readable", this.handleReadable);
    }
    this.rawModeEnabledCount++;
  } else {
    if (--this.rawModeEnabledCount === 0) {
      stdin.setRawMode(false);
      stdin.removeListener("readable", this.handleReadable);
      stdin.unref();
    }
  }
};

README / docs

// confirmation-dialog.js — 키 바인딩 설정
TerminalKeyBindingSetup({ logger, terminal, terminalName, onConfirm }) {
  return ConfirmationDialog({
    title: "Set up terminal for multi-line input support",
    body: [
      `Detected terminal ${terminalName} which supports multi-line input`,
      "by setting up a key binding for shift+enter.",
      "Would you like to add this key binding to your terminal configuration?"
    ],
    items: [{ label: "Yes", value: true }],
    escapeItem: { label: "No", value: false },
  });
}

README / docs

// 1021__slash-promises.js — 셸 설정
function getShellConfig(options) {
  let shell = process.platform === "win32" ? Shell.powerShell : Shell.bash;
  
  if (options.enableScriptSafety) {
    shell = shell.withScriptSafetyAssessor(treeSitterAssessor);  // tree-sitter 기반
  } else {
    shell = shell.withScriptSafetyAssessor(noopAssessor);        // 모든 것을 readOnly: false
  }

  return shell;
}

// noop assessor — 안전성 검사 없음 (폴백)
const noopAssessor = async (shellType, command) => ({
  result: "completed",
  commands: [{ identifier: command, readOnly: false }],
  possiblePaths: [],
  possibleUrls: [],
  hasWriteFileRedirection: false,
  canOfferSessionApproval: false,
  hasDangerousExpansion: false,
});

Main analysis

Copilot CLI sandbox/execution policy analysis

Analysis snapshot: 151_copilot_cli/ — sandbox and execution policy.

⚠️ Decompile bundle analysis: 1718__LGt.js (approval dialog), 1021__slash-promises.js (tree-sitter command parsing/readOnly decision), 0662__pty-shell-session.js (PTY execution), confirm_folder_trust.js (folder trust), 1025__workspace-context.js (Zod permission schema) reverse engineering analysis.

Copilot CLI has no OS level sandbox. It is fundamentally different from Codex's seatbelt/bubblewrap/restricted token or Claude Code's sandbox-exec + bwrap wrapping. Instead, security is managed in three layers. First, tree-sitter based command parser analyzes shell commands as AST and determines whether each command is readOnly. Second, 7 Zod schema-based permission request systems manage tool-specific approvals. Third, the 3-tier approval model (once/session/location) reduces approval fatigue.

The core structure is as follows: When LLM suggests a shell command, it parses it with the tree-sitter and extracts the command identifier (identifier) and the readOnly flag. If readOnly=true, automatic approval of the entire session (canOfferSessionApproval) is possible, and if readOnly=false, individual approval is required. There are three approval results: approve-once, approve-for-session, and approve-for-location.

graph TD
    subgraph TreeSitter["명령 파서 (tree-sitter)"]
        Parse["tree-sitter parse(command)"]
        Extract["명령/경로/URL 추출"]
        ReadOnly["readOnly 판정"]
        Expand["위험 확장 감지<br/>(command_substitution,<br/>process_substitution)"]
    end

    subgraph PermissionSystem["권한 시스템 (7종)"]
        ShellPerm["shell 권한<br/>(fullCommandText, commands[],<br/>possiblePaths[], readOnly)"]
        WritePerm["write 권한<br/>(fileName, diff, newFileContents)"]
        ReadPerm["read 권한<br/>(path, intention)"]
        MCPPerm["mcp 권한<br/>(serverName, toolName, readOnly)"]
        URLPerm["url 권한<br/>(url, intention)"]
        MemPerm["memory 권한<br/>(subject, fact, citations)"]
        CustomPerm["custom-tool 권한<br/>(toolName, args)"]
    end

    subgraph ApprovalTier["3-Tier 승인"]
        Once["approve-once<br/>1회성"]
        Session["approve-for-session<br/>세션 전체"]
        Location["approve-for-location<br/>영구 (PERSISTED_PERMISSIONS)"]
    end

    Parse --> Extract
    Extract --> ReadOnly
    ReadOnly --> Expand
    Extract -->|"명령"| ShellPerm
    ShellPerm --> Once
    ShellPerm -->|"canOfferSessionApproval"| Session
    ShellPerm -->|"PERSISTED_PERMISSIONS"| Location
    WritePerm --> Once
    MCPPerm --> Session

1. Tree-sitter based command parser (1021__slash-promises.js)

The core of Copilot CLI's command security determination is tree-sitter AST analysis. This corresponds to Codex's is_known_safe_command() whitelist or Gemini CLI's isKnownSafeCommand(), but the implementation depth is different. It is not regular expression matching, but AST-based analysis that parses shell language grammar.

1.1 Parser initialization and language support

// 1021__slash-promises.js — tree-sitter 언어 로딩
async function loadLanguage(shellType) {
  switch (shellType) {
    case "bash":
      return { package: "tree-sitter-bash", file: "tree-sitter-bash.wasm" };
    case "powershell":
      return { package: "tree-sitter-powershell", file: "tree-sitter-powershell.wasm" };
  }
}

Based on WASM, it supports two shells: tree-sitter-bash and tree-sitter-powershell. If WASM fails to load, the $xe error state is set, and subsequent parsing conservatively falls back to readOnly: false for all commands.

1.2 Command parsing flow

sequenceDiagram
    participant L as LLM
    participant P as 명령 파서
    participant T as tree-sitter
    participant A as 승인 시스템

    L->>P: 셸 명령 제안
    P->>T: parse(command)
    T-->>P: AST (rootNode)
    
    P->>P: 1. command 노드 순회
    P->>P: 2. identifier + readOnly 판정
    P->>P: 3. 경로/URL 추출
    P->>P: 4. 위험 확장 감지
    P->>P: 5. 리다이렉션 감지
    P->>P: 6. 환경변수 위험 판정
    
    P-->>A: SafetyAssessment
    Note over A: canOfferSessionApproval =<br/>!hasPotentiallyConfusingConstructs

1.3 Critical AST Node (Trust 🟢 High)

Node types that evaluate to hasPotentiallyConfusingConstructs: true in the tree-sitter AST:

// 1021__slash-promises.js — 위험 AST 노드
const CONFUSING_CONSTRUCTS = new Set([
  "expansion",              // ${var}
  "simple_expansion",       // $var
  "command_substitution",   // $(cmd) — 가장 위험
  "process_substitution",   // <(cmd) / >(cmd)
  "arithmetic_expansion",   // $((expr))
  "variable_assignment",    // var=value
  "variable_assignments",   // export var=val
  "if_statement",           // if/then/fi
  "for_statement",          // for loop
  "while_statement",        // while loop
  "case_statement",         // case/esac
  "function_definition",    // function f() {}
  "subshell",               // (cmd)
  "compound_statement",     // { cmd; }
  "test_command",           // [[ expr ]]
  "negated_command",        // ! cmd
  // ... 기타 제어 구조
]);

If any of these nodes are included, canOfferSessionApproval = false and the entire session approval option disappears. In other words, compound commands containing conditional statements, loops, subshells, and variable expansions must undergo individual approval.

1.4 readOnly command taxonomy (high reliability 🟢)

Determines whether readOnly is present for the command identifier parsed by tree-sitter:

Unconditionally readOnly (common to bash + powershell):

cat, cd, echo, false, grep, head, hostname, ls, pwd, true, whoami

bash-only readOnly:

basename, cal, cut, df, diff, dirname, du, expr, file, free, groups,
id, nl, printenv, ps, readlink, realpath, set, stat, tail, top, tr,
type, uname, uniq, unset, uptime, wc, whatis, whereis, which

ReadOnly for PowerShell only (only when no ScriptBlock is present):

Compare-Object, Format-List, Format-Table, Get-ChildItem, Get-Command,
Get-Content, Get-Date, Get-Help, Get-Item, Get-Location, Get-Member,
Get-Process, Group-Object, Join-Path, Measure-Object, Out-Host,
Out-String, Resolve-Path, Select-Object, Select-String, Sort-Object,
Split-Path, Test-Path, Where-Object

1.5 Conditional readOnly decision (confidence 🟢 high)

Some commands are readOnly dependent on their arguments:

command readOnly condition readOnly=false condition
rg (ripgrep) Basic When the --pre and --pre-glob flags are present
find When there is no -exec/-delete, etc. -exec, -execdir, -ok, -delete, -fls, -fprint
sed sed -n '3p' file pattern only All the rest use sed
sort Basic -o, --output, --compress-program
date Basic -s, --set
git blame, branch, diff, log, ls-files, rev-parse, show, status, tag remain. If --upload-pack is present, it is always false
git remote show, get-url, -v rest

1.6 Dangerous Expansion Detection (hasDangerousExpansion)

Even if a command is evaluated as readOnly=true, if the argument includes command_substitution or process_substitution, it will be overridden with hasDangerousExpansion: true and demoted to readOnly: false:

// 1021__slash-promises.js — 위험 확장 감지
function hasDangerousExpansion(containerNode) {
  return descendantsOfType(containerNode, "command_substitution").length > 0 ||
         descendantsOfType(containerNode, "process_substitution").length > 0
    ? true
    : descendantsOfType(containerNode, "expansion").some(e => hasParameterModification(e));
}

1.7 Environmental variable risk determination

When assignment to 10 risky environment variables such as PAGER, GIT_EDITOR, SHELL, and GIT_SSH_COMMAND is detected, unconditionally use canOfferSessionApproval: false:

// 위험 환경 변수 목록
const DANGEROUS_ENV_VARS = [
  "PAGER", "GIT_PAGER", "MANPAGER", "EDITOR", "VISUAL",
  "GIT_EDITOR", "SHELL", "GIT_SSH_COMMAND", "GIT_ASKPASS"
].map(v => v.toLowerCase());

1.8 File redirection detection

>, >> If redirection is included, hasWriteFileRedirection: true. However, 2>&1 and 1>&2 are determined not to be redirections. Input redirection (<, <&, <&-) is also treated as safe.

1.9 URL command extraction

Extracts URLs from arguments of network commands such as curl, wget, fetch, and Invoke-WebRequest and returns them as possibleUrls:

// URL 추출 대상 명령 목록
const URL_COMMANDS = new Set([
  "curl", "wget", "fetch", "http", "https", "aria2c", "axel",
  "lynx", "w3m", "links", "elinks", "nc", "netcat", "telnet",
  "Invoke-WebRequest", "Invoke-RestMethod",
]);

2. 3-Tier approval model (1718__LGt.js)

각 권한 종류마다 1~3가지 승인 옵션을 제공한다. This is a different approach from Codex's five-level approval (Never/OnFailure/OnRequest/UnlessTrusted/Granular).

2.1 Authorization response type

응답 key range continuous
Yes approve-once Current command only 즉시 소멸
Yes, approve for session approve-for-session Session All (same command/tool) Until process ends
Yes, don't ask again approve-for-location persistent (per repo/directory) 디스크 저장
No reject — Reject + Feedback Options

approve-for-location is only displayed when the PERSISTED_PERMISSIONS feature flag is enabled. 비활성 시 approve-for-session으로 폴백한다.

2.2 Shell command approval dialog (reliability 🟢 high)

// 1718__LGt.js — 셸 커맨드 승인 UI (재구성)
function ShellApprovalDialog({ req, onConfirm, locationKey, featureFlags }) {
  const options = [];

  if (featureFlags?.PERSISTED_PERMISSIONS && locationKey) {
    // 영구 승인: "Yes, and don't ask again for `git status` in this repo (/path)"
    options.push({
      label: `Yes, and don't ask again for ${formatCommands(req.commandIdentifiers)} ${locationDescription(locationKey)}`,
      value: {
        kind: "approve-for-location",
        approval: { kind: "commands", commandIdentifiers: req.commandIdentifiers },
        locationKey,
      },
    });
  } else if (req.canOfferSessionApproval) {
    // 세션 승인: "Yes, and approve `git status` for the rest of the running session"
    options.push({
      label: `Yes, and approve ${formatCommands(req.commandIdentifiers)} for the rest of the running session`,
      value: {
        kind: "approve-for-session",
        approval: { kind: "commands", commandIdentifiers: req.commandIdentifiers },
      },
    });
  }

  // 기본: [Yes], [No, and tell Copilot what to do differently]
  return ConfirmationDialog({ items: [{ label: "Yes", value: { kind: "approve-once" } }, ...options] });
}

Key observation: canOfferSessionApproval is determined by !hasPotentiallyConfusingConstructs described in 1.3. This means the session authorization option disappears in complex commands containing variable expansions, control structures, and subshells.

2.3 File edit approval dialog

// 1718__LGt.js — 파일 편집 승인 (재구성)
// 세션 승인: "Yes, and approve all file operations for the rest of the running session"
{ kind: "approve-for-session", approval: { kind: "write" } }

// 영구 승인 (PERSISTED_PERMISSIONS 활성 시):
// "Yes, and don't ask again for file operations when in this repo (/path)"
{ kind: "approve-for-location", approval: { kind: "write" }, locationKey }

IDE diff integration is also included. If onOpenIdeDiff is provided, the user can check and save/cancel the diff directly from the IDE.

2.4 MCP Tool Approval

The MCP tool provides granular authorization:

Scope of approval Example label
1 time single tool “Yes”
Single tool session Yes, and approve tool "read_file" from server "fs" for the rest of the running session
Full server session Yes, and approve all tools from server "fs" for the rest of the running session
Single Tool Permanent Yes, and don't ask again for tool "read_file" from "fs" in this repo

2.5 Memory storage authorization

// memory 권한 승인 — 세션/영구
{ kind: "approve-for-session", approval: { kind: "memory" } }
{ kind: "approve-for-location", approval: { kind: "memory" }, locationKey }

2.6 Custom Tool Approval

The extension tool (custom-tool) does not provide approve-for-location, only approve-for-session:

// 1718__LGt.js — custom tool 승인
[
  { label: "Yes", value: { kind: "approve-once" } },
  { label: `Yes, and approve "${toolName}" for the rest of the session`, 
    value: { kind: "approve-for-session", approval: { kind: "custom-tool", toolName } } },
  { label: "No", value: { kind: "reject" } },
]

2.7 Hook permission request

Separate approval dialog for hooks that run before and after calling the tool. Only provides Yes/No, no session/permanent approval options:

// 1718__LGt.js — hook 승인
{
  title: "Hook permission request",
  body: [warning, toolName, toolArgs],
  items: [{ label: "Yes", value: true }],
  escapeItem: { label: "No", value: false },
}

3. Folder trust model (confirm_folder_trust.js)

The first time Copilot CLI runs, it displays a Trust Confirmation Dialog for the working directory. This is similar to VS Code's "Workspace Trust" pattern.

// confirm_folder_trust.js — 폴더 신뢰 확인 (재구성)
function ConfirmFolderTrust({ folderPath, onConfirm }) {
  return ConfirmationDialog({
    title: "Confirm folder trust",
    body: [
      folderPath,
      "Copilot may read files in this folder. Reading untrusted files may lead Copilot to behave in unexpected ways.",
      "With your permission, Copilot may execute code or bash commands in this folder.",
      "Executing untrusted code is unsafe.",
      "Do you trust the files in this folder?"
    ],
    items: [
      { label: "Yes", value: "yes" },
      { label: "Yes, and remember this folder for future sessions", value: "remember" },
    ],
    escapeItem: { label: "No", value: "no" },
  });
}

3 responses:

  • "yes": Trusted only in current session
  • "remember": Trust permanently (stored in settings)
  • "no": Not trusted → Copilot's code execution/file reading is restricted

4. Execution policy by tool type

4.1 Policy Matrix (Confidence 🟢 High)

Tool Type Default policy Approval Method Session/Permanent Approval Remarks
shell Approval required tree-sitter analysis → dialog readOnly during session; PERSISTED city location most complex flow
write Approval required Show diff → Dialog session / location IDE diff integration
read Approval required path + intention sign — Sensitive files such as .env*
mcp Approval required Tool name/server name/parameter display session by tool/server; location readOnly MCP is automatic
url Approval required Show URL + intention —
memory Approval required Show subject + fact + citations session / location
custom-tool Approval required Tool name + argument display session only location not supported

4.2 SafetyAssessment return structure

The tree-sitter parsing results are returned in the following structure:

// 재구성된 SafetyAssessment 인터페이스
interface SafetyAssessment {
  result: "completed";
  commands: Array<{ identifier: string; readOnly: boolean }>;
  possiblePaths: string[];           // 파싱된 파일 경로
  possibleUrls: Array<{ url: string }>; // curl/wget 등의 URL
  hasWriteFileRedirection: boolean;  // > 또는 >> 포함
  canOfferSessionApproval: boolean;  // !hasPotentiallyConfusingConstructs
  hasDangerousExpansion: boolean;    // $(cmd) 또는 <(cmd) 포함
  warning?: string;                  // 파서 에러 시 메시지
}

5. PTY terminal abstraction

5.1 PTY system in terminal-base.js

// terminal-base.js — PTY 터미널 (재구성)
class TerminalBase extends EventEmitter2 {
  pty;           // node-pty 인스턴스
  encoding;      // 문자 인코딩
  flowControl;   // XON/XOFF 흐름 제어

  constructor(options) {
    this.pty = spawn(options.shell, options.args, {
      name: options.termName,
      cols: options.cols || 80,
      rows: options.rows || 24,
      cwd: options.cwd,
      env: options.env,
    });

    // 흐름 제어 설정
    if (options.flowControl) {
      this.flowControl = {
        xon: "\x11",    // XON (DC1)
        xoff: "\x13",   // XOFF (DC3)
        enabled: true,
      };
    }
  }
}

5.2 Raw Mode Reference Count (Reliability 🟢 High)

Safely manage nested raw mode requests:

// cleanup.js — Raw mode 안전한 중첩 관리
handleSetRawMode = (enable) => {
  if (enable) {
    if (this.rawModeEnabledCount === 0) {
      stdin.ref();
      stdin.setRawMode(true);
      stdin.addListener("readable", this.handleReadable);
    }
    this.rawModeEnabledCount++;
  } else {
    if (--this.rawModeEnabledCount === 0) {
      stdin.setRawMode(false);
      stdin.removeListener("readable", this.handleReadable);
      stdin.unref();
    }
  }
};

6. Key binding settings dialog

Permissions dialog to set Shift+Enter key bindings for multiline input in the terminal:

// confirmation-dialog.js — 키 바인딩 설정
TerminalKeyBindingSetup({ logger, terminal, terminalName, onConfirm }) {
  return ConfirmationDialog({
    title: "Set up terminal for multi-line input support",
    body: [
      `Detected terminal ${terminalName} which supports multi-line input`,
      "by setting up a key binding for shift+enter.",
      "Would you like to add this key binding to your terminal configuration?"
    ],
    items: [{ label: "Yes", value: true }],
    escapeItem: { label: "No", value: false },
  });
}

7. Shell type detection and script safety

// 1021__slash-promises.js — 셸 설정
function getShellConfig(options) {
  let shell = process.platform === "win32" ? Shell.powerShell : Shell.bash;
  
  if (options.enableScriptSafety) {
    shell = shell.withScriptSafetyAssessor(treeSitterAssessor);  // tree-sitter 기반
  } else {
    shell = shell.withScriptSafetyAssessor(noopAssessor);        // 모든 것을 readOnly: false
  }

  return shell;
}

// noop assessor — 안전성 검사 없음 (폴백)
const noopAssessor = async (shellType, command) => ({
  result: "completed",
  commands: [{ identifier: command, readOnly: false }],
  possiblePaths: [],
  possibleUrls: [],
  hasWriteFileRedirection: false,
  canOfferSessionApproval: false,
  hasDangerousExpansion: false,
});

If enableScriptSafety is disabled, all commands are treated as readOnly: false, canOfferSessionApproval: false.

Comparison of 5 agents

Characteristics Copilot CLI Codex Gemini CLI Claude Code OpenCode
OS isolation ❌ None 🔒 Seatbelt/bwrap/RestrictedToken 🔒 Seatbelt/bwrap/RestrictedToken 🔒 sandbox-exec/bwrap ❌ None
network restrictions ❌ None 🔒 seccomp/firewall 🔒 Policy-based 🔒 Proxy Filtering ❌ None
Command classification tree-sitter AST analysis is_known_safe_command + Starlark isKnownSafeCommand whitelist No Allow/Deny (sandbox dependent) BashArity prefix
Approved Model 3-tier (once/session/location) 5 types (Never~Granular) 4 types (default/autoEdit/yolo/plan) sandbox + dangerouslyDisable 3 types (allow/deny/ask)
Folder Trust ✅ Explicit dialog ❌ (replaced by sandbox) ❌ (replaced by sandbox) ❌ (replaced by sandbox) ❌ (Compare paths)
shell parser tree-sitter (bash/PowerShell) None (Starlark rules) tree-sitter based commandSafety None tree-sitter (160+ arity)
session permissions ✅ session + location ❌ (none) ✅ persistent approval ❌ (sandbox level) ✅ always cumulative

Core module map

module Role Reliability
1021__slash-promises.js tree-sitter command parser, readOnly decision, dangerous extension detection, URL extraction ★★★
1718__LGt.js Authorization dialog (shell/write/mcp/memory/custom-tool/hook) ★★★
1025__workspace-context.js Zod schema-based authorization input/output type definition ★★★
confirm_folder_trust.js Folder trust confirmation dialog ★★★
terminal-base.js PTY terminal abstraction (node-pty, XON/XOFF) ★★★
cleanup.js Raw mode reference count management ★★★
0662__pty-shell-session.js PTY shell session management, permission request propagation ★★★
confirmation-dialog.js Ink-based confirmation dialog framework ★★★

List of core files

  • 151_copilot_cli/decoded/01_core/1021__slash-promises-this-todo-ide-tools-sql-login-github-json-docs.js
  • 151_copilot_cli/decoded/02_session/1718__LGt.js
  • 151_copilot_cli/decoded/03_agents/runtime/1025__workspace-context.js
  • 151_copilot_cli/decoded/01_core/tui/modals/confirm_folder_trust.js
  • 151_copilot_cli/decoded/01_core/shell/0662__pty-shell-session.js

Fork Perspective

  • tree-sitter based command parsing provides much more accurate security decisions than regular expressions
  • 3-tier authorization model (once/session/location) effectively reduces authorization fatigue
  • Conditional marking in canOfferSessionApproval is a conservative approach to compound commands
  • Gradually deploy persistent permissions with the PERSISTED_PERMISSIONS feature flag.
  • readOnly + hasDangerousExpansion double check reduces false positives
  • raw mode reference counting is a good pattern for safe nesting management
  • No OS sandbox is a fundamental weakness from a security perspective
  • If PowerShell ScriptBlock is included, all checks are waived (readOnly: false)
  • tree-sitter WASM conservative fallback works when loading fails, but security visibility is reduced

이전 문서: [[06_cp_surface]] 다음 문서: [[08_cp_config]]

snapshot_to_current delta

Area Snapshot Current
Axis surface Paths cited in-body APIs/flags evolve per release — re-verify on upgrade
Host delegation Documented in this checkout Binary-only drift for closed-source CLIs

Change history

  • 2026-03-26: Initial analysis of the Copilot CLI sandbox with 7 permission types, PTY-based terminal, and directory-based permission dialog.
  • 2026-03-26: Added in-depth analysis of tree-sitter based command parser — readOnly classification system (40+ commands), risk extension detection, environmental variable risk determination, 3-tier authorization model (once/session/location), folder trust model, SafetyAssessment structure, shell type detection, MCP·memory·custom-tool·hook authorization analysis. Added 15 source code snippets and 2 Mermaid diagrams.

Korean corpus (reference)

Verbatim KO corpus 007_sandbox-exec-policy/07_cp_sandbox.md for cross-check; code blocks unchanged.

Copilot CLI 샌드박스·실행 정책 분석

분석 스냅샷: 151_copilot_cli/ — sandbox and execution policy.

⚠️ 디컴파일 번들 분석: 1718__LGt.js(승인 다이얼로그), 1021__slash-promises.js(tree-sitter 명령 파싱·readOnly 판정), 0662__pty-shell-session.js(PTY 실행), confirm_folder_trust.js(폴더 신뢰), 1025__workspace-context.js(Zod 권한 스키마) 역공학 분석이다.

Copilot CLI는 OS 수준 샌드박스가 없다. Codex의 seatbelt/bubblewrap/restricted token이나 Claude Code의 sandbox-exec + bwrap 래핑과 근본적으로 다르다. 대신 세 개의 레이어로 보안을 관리한다. 첫째, tree-sitter 기반 명령 파서가 셸 명령을 AST로 분석해 각 명령의 readOnly 여부를 판정한다. 둘째, 7가지 Zod 스키마 기반 권한 요청 시스템이 도구별 승인을 관리한다. 셋째, 3-tier 승인 모델(once/session/location)이 승인 피로를 줄인다.

핵심 구조는 다음과 같다. LLM이 셸 명령을 제안하면 tree-sitter로 파싱해 명령 식별자(identifier)와 readOnly 플래그를 추출한다. readOnly=true이면 세션 전체 자동 승인(canOfferSessionApproval)이 가능하고, readOnly=false이면 개별 승인이 필요하다. 승인 결과는 approve-once, approve-for-session, approve-for-location 세 가지다.

graph TD
    subgraph TreeSitter["명령 파서 (tree-sitter)"]
        Parse["tree-sitter parse(command)"]
        Extract["명령/경로/URL 추출"]
        ReadOnly["readOnly 판정"]
        Expand["위험 확장 감지<br/>(command_substitution,<br/>process_substitution)"]
    end

    subgraph PermissionSystem["권한 시스템 (7종)"]
        ShellPerm["shell 권한<br/>(fullCommandText, commands[],<br/>possiblePaths[], readOnly)"]
        WritePerm["write 권한<br/>(fileName, diff, newFileContents)"]
        ReadPerm["read 권한<br/>(path, intention)"]
        MCPPerm["mcp 권한<br/>(serverName, toolName, readOnly)"]
        URLPerm["url 권한<br/>(url, intention)"]
        MemPerm["memory 권한<br/>(subject, fact, citations)"]
        CustomPerm["custom-tool 권한<br/>(toolName, args)"]
    end

    subgraph ApprovalTier["3-Tier 승인"]
        Once["approve-once<br/>1회성"]
        Session["approve-for-session<br/>세션 전체"]
        Location["approve-for-location<br/>영구 (PERSISTED_PERMISSIONS)"]
    end

    Parse --> Extract
    Extract --> ReadOnly
    ReadOnly --> Expand
    Extract -->|"명령"| ShellPerm
    ShellPerm --> Once
    ShellPerm -->|"canOfferSessionApproval"| Session
    ShellPerm -->|"PERSISTED_PERMISSIONS"| Location
    WritePerm --> Once
    MCPPerm --> Session

1. Tree-sitter 기반 명령 파서 (1021__slash-promises.js)

Copilot CLI의 명령 보안 판정의 핵심은 tree-sitter AST 분석이다. 이것은 Codex의 is_known_safe_command() 화이트리스트나 Gemini CLI의 isKnownSafeCommand()와 대응하지만, 구현 깊이가 다르다. 정규식 매칭이 아니라 셸 언어 문법을 파싱한 AST 기반 분석이다.

1.1 파서 초기화와 언어 지원

// 1021__slash-promises.js — tree-sitter 언어 로딩
async function loadLanguage(shellType) {
  switch (shellType) {
    case "bash":
      return { package: "tree-sitter-bash", file: "tree-sitter-bash.wasm" };
    case "powershell":
      return { package: "tree-sitter-powershell", file: "tree-sitter-powershell.wasm" };
  }
}

WASM 기반으로 tree-sitter-bash와 tree-sitter-powershell 두 가지 셸을 지원한다. WASM 로딩 실패 시 $xe 에러 상태가 설정되고, 이후 파싱은 모든 명령을 readOnly: false로 보수적 폴백한다.

1.2 명령 파싱 흐름

sequenceDiagram
    participant L as LLM
    participant P as 명령 파서
    participant T as tree-sitter
    participant A as 승인 시스템

    L->>P: 셸 명령 제안
    P->>T: parse(command)
    T-->>P: AST (rootNode)
    
    P->>P: 1. command 노드 순회
    P->>P: 2. identifier + readOnly 판정
    P->>P: 3. 경로/URL 추출
    P->>P: 4. 위험 확장 감지
    P->>P: 5. 리다이렉션 감지
    P->>P: 6. 환경변수 위험 판정
    
    P-->>A: SafetyAssessment
    Note over A: canOfferSessionApproval =<br/>!hasPotentiallyConfusingConstructs

1.3 위험 AST 노드 (신뢰도 🟢 높음)

tree-sitter AST에서 hasPotentiallyConfusingConstructs: true로 판정되는 노드 유형:

// 1021__slash-promises.js — 위험 AST 노드
const CONFUSING_CONSTRUCTS = new Set([
  "expansion",              // ${var}
  "simple_expansion",       // $var
  "command_substitution",   // $(cmd) — 가장 위험
  "process_substitution",   // <(cmd) / >(cmd)
  "arithmetic_expansion",   // $((expr))
  "variable_assignment",    // var=value
  "variable_assignments",   // export var=val
  "if_statement",           // if/then/fi
  "for_statement",          // for loop
  "while_statement",        // while loop
  "case_statement",         // case/esac
  "function_definition",    // function f() {}
  "subshell",               // (cmd)
  "compound_statement",     // { cmd; }
  "test_command",           // [[ expr ]]
  "negated_command",        // ! cmd
  // ... 기타 제어 구조
]);

이 노드 중 하나라도 포함되면 canOfferSessionApproval = false가 되어 세션 전체 승인 옵션이 사라진다. 즉 조건문, 루프, 서브셸, 변수 확장이 포함된 복합 명령은 반드시 개별 승인을 거쳐야 한다.

1.4 readOnly 명령 분류 체계 (신뢰도 🟢 높음)

tree-sitter로 파싱한 명령 식별자에 대해 readOnly 여부를 판정한다:

무조건 readOnly (bash + powershell 공통):

cat, cd, echo, false, grep, head, hostname, ls, pwd, true, whoami

bash 전용 readOnly:

basename, cal, cut, df, diff, dirname, du, expr, file, free, groups,
id, nl, printenv, ps, readlink, realpath, set, stat, tail, top, tr,
type, uname, uniq, unset, uptime, wc, whatis, whereis, which

PowerShell 전용 readOnly (ScriptBlock이 없을 때만):

Compare-Object, Format-List, Format-Table, Get-ChildItem, Get-Command,
Get-Content, Get-Date, Get-Help, Get-Item, Get-Location, Get-Member,
Get-Process, Group-Object, Join-Path, Measure-Object, Out-Host,
Out-String, Resolve-Path, Select-Object, Select-String, Sort-Object,
Split-Path, Test-Path, Where-Object

1.5 조건부 readOnly 판정 (신뢰도 🟢 높음)

일부 명령은 인자에 따라 readOnly 여부가 달라진다:

명령 readOnly 조건 readOnly=false 조건
rg (ripgrep) 기본 --pre, --pre-glob 플래그 있을 때
find -exec/-delete 등 없을 때 -exec, -execdir, -ok, -delete, -fls, -fprint
sed sed -n '3p' file 패턴만 나머지 모든 sed 사용
sort 기본 -o, --output, --compress-program
date 기본 -s, --set
git blame, branch, diff, log, ls-files, rev-parse, show, status, tag 나머지. --upload-pack 있으면 무조건 false
git remote show, get-url, -v 나머지

1.6 위험 확장 감지 (hasDangerousExpansion)

readOnly=true로 판정된 명령이라도, 인자에 command_substitution이나 process_substitution이 포함되면 hasDangerousExpansion: true로 오버라이드되어 readOnly: false로 강등된다:

// 1021__slash-promises.js — 위험 확장 감지
function hasDangerousExpansion(containerNode) {
  return descendantsOfType(containerNode, "command_substitution").length > 0 ||
         descendantsOfType(containerNode, "process_substitution").length > 0
    ? true
    : descendantsOfType(containerNode, "expansion").some(e => hasParameterModification(e));
}

1.7 환경 변수 위험 판정

PAGER, GIT_EDITOR, SHELL, GIT_SSH_COMMAND 등 10가지 위험 환경 변수에 대한 할당이 감지되면 무조건 canOfferSessionApproval: false:

// 위험 환경 변수 목록
const DANGEROUS_ENV_VARS = [
  "PAGER", "GIT_PAGER", "MANPAGER", "EDITOR", "VISUAL",
  "GIT_EDITOR", "SHELL", "GIT_SSH_COMMAND", "GIT_ASKPASS"
].map(v => v.toLowerCase());

1.8 파일 리다이렉션 감지

>, >> 리다이렉션이 포함되면 hasWriteFileRedirection: true. 단, 2>&1, 1>&2는 리다이렉션이 아닌 것으로 판정. 입력 리다이렉션(<, <&, <&-)도 안전으로 처리한다.

1.9 URL 명령 추출

curl, wget, fetch, Invoke-WebRequest 등 네트워크 명령의 인자에서 URL을 추출해 possibleUrls로 반환한다:

// URL 추출 대상 명령 목록
const URL_COMMANDS = new Set([
  "curl", "wget", "fetch", "http", "https", "aria2c", "axel",
  "lynx", "w3m", "links", "elinks", "nc", "netcat", "telnet",
  "Invoke-WebRequest", "Invoke-RestMethod",
]);

2. 3-Tier 승인 모델 (1718__LGt.js)

각 권한 종류마다 1~3가지 승인 옵션을 제공한다. 이것은 Codex의 5단계 승인(Never/OnFailure/OnRequest/UnlessTrusted/Granular)과 다른 접근이다.

2.1 승인 응답 유형

응답 키 범위 지속
Yes approve-once 현재 명령만 즉시 소멸
Yes, approve for session approve-for-session 세션 전체 (동일 명령/도구) 프로세스 종료까지
Yes, don't ask again approve-for-location 영구 (레포/디렉토리 단위) 디스크 저장
No reject — 거부 + 피드백 옵션

approve-for-location은 PERSISTED_PERMISSIONS 피처 플래그가 활성화되어야만 표시된다. 비활성 시 approve-for-session으로 폴백한다.

2.2 셸 명령 승인 다이얼로그 (신뢰도 🟢 높음)

// 1718__LGt.js — 셸 커맨드 승인 UI (재구성)
function ShellApprovalDialog({ req, onConfirm, locationKey, featureFlags }) {
  const options = [];

  if (featureFlags?.PERSISTED_PERMISSIONS && locationKey) {
    // 영구 승인: "Yes, and don't ask again for `git status` in this repo (/path)"
    options.push({
      label: `Yes, and don't ask again for ${formatCommands(req.commandIdentifiers)} ${locationDescription(locationKey)}`,
      value: {
        kind: "approve-for-location",
        approval: { kind: "commands", commandIdentifiers: req.commandIdentifiers },
        locationKey,
      },
    });
  } else if (req.canOfferSessionApproval) {
    // 세션 승인: "Yes, and approve `git status` for the rest of the running session"
    options.push({
      label: `Yes, and approve ${formatCommands(req.commandIdentifiers)} for the rest of the running session`,
      value: {
        kind: "approve-for-session",
        approval: { kind: "commands", commandIdentifiers: req.commandIdentifiers },
      },
    });
  }

  // 기본: [Yes], [No, and tell Copilot what to do differently]
  return ConfirmationDialog({ items: [{ label: "Yes", value: { kind: "approve-once" } }, ...options] });
}

핵심 관찰: canOfferSessionApproval은 1.3에서 설명한 !hasPotentiallyConfusingConstructs로 결정된다. 즉 변수 확장, 제어 구조, 서브셸이 포함된 복합 명령에서는 세션 승인 옵션이 사라진다.

2.3 파일 편집 승인 다이얼로그

// 1718__LGt.js — 파일 편집 승인 (재구성)
// 세션 승인: "Yes, and approve all file operations for the rest of the running session"
{ kind: "approve-for-session", approval: { kind: "write" } }

// 영구 승인 (PERSISTED_PERMISSIONS 활성 시):
// "Yes, and don't ask again for file operations when in this repo (/path)"
{ kind: "approve-for-location", approval: { kind: "write" }, locationKey }

IDE diff 연동도 포함된다. onOpenIdeDiff가 제공되면, 사용자가 IDE에서 직접 diff를 확인하고 저장/취소할 수 있다.

2.4 MCP 도구 승인

MCP 도구는 세분화된 승인을 제공한다:

승인 범위 예시 라벨
단일 도구 1회 "Yes"
단일 도구 세션 Yes, and approve tool "read_file" from server "fs" for the rest of the running session
전체 서버 세션 Yes, and approve all tools from server "fs" for the rest of the running session
단일 도구 영구 Yes, and don't ask again for tool "read_file" from "fs" in this repo

2.5 메모리 저장 승인

// memory 권한 승인 — 세션/영구
{ kind: "approve-for-session", approval: { kind: "memory" } }
{ kind: "approve-for-location", approval: { kind: "memory" }, locationKey }

2.6 Custom Tool 승인

확장 도구(custom-tool)는 approve-for-location이 없고, approve-for-session만 제공한다:

// 1718__LGt.js — custom tool 승인
[
  { label: "Yes", value: { kind: "approve-once" } },
  { label: `Yes, and approve "${toolName}" for the rest of the session`, 
    value: { kind: "approve-for-session", approval: { kind: "custom-tool", toolName } } },
  { label: "No", value: { kind: "reject" } },
]

2.7 Hook 권한 요청

도구 호출 전후에 실행되는 hook에 대한 별도 승인 다이얼로그. Yes/No만 제공하고, 세션/영구 승인 옵션은 없다:

// 1718__LGt.js — hook 승인
{
  title: "Hook permission request",
  body: [warning, toolName, toolArgs],
  items: [{ label: "Yes", value: true }],
  escapeItem: { label: "No", value: false },
}

3. 폴더 신뢰 모델 (confirm_folder_trust.js)

Copilot CLI는 첫 실행 시 작업 디렉토리에 대한 신뢰 확인 다이얼로그를 표시한다. 이것은 VS Code의 "Workspace Trust" 패턴과 유사하다.

// confirm_folder_trust.js — 폴더 신뢰 확인 (재구성)
function ConfirmFolderTrust({ folderPath, onConfirm }) {
  return ConfirmationDialog({
    title: "Confirm folder trust",
    body: [
      folderPath,
      "Copilot may read files in this folder. Reading untrusted files may lead Copilot to behave in unexpected ways.",
      "With your permission, Copilot may execute code or bash commands in this folder.",
      "Executing untrusted code is unsafe.",
      "Do you trust the files in this folder?"
    ],
    items: [
      { label: "Yes", value: "yes" },
      { label: "Yes, and remember this folder for future sessions", value: "remember" },
    ],
    escapeItem: { label: "No", value: "no" },
  });
}

응답 3가지:

  • "yes": 현재 세션에서만 신뢰
  • "remember": 영구적으로 신뢰 (설정에 저장)
  • "no": 신뢰하지 않음 → Copilot의 코드 실행/파일 읽기가 제한됨

4. 도구 타입별 실행 정책

4.1 정책 매트릭스 (신뢰도 🟢 높음)

도구 유형 기본 정책 승인 방식 세션/영구 승인 비고
shell 승인 필요 tree-sitter 분석 → 다이얼로그 readOnly 시 session; PERSISTED 시 location 가장 복잡한 흐름
write 승인 필요 diff 표시 → 다이얼로그 session / location IDE diff 연동
read 승인 필요 path + intention 표시 — .env* 등 민감 파일
mcp 승인 필요 도구명/서버명/인자 표시 도구별 / 서버별 session; location readOnly MCP는 자동
url 승인 필요 URL + intention 표시 —
memory 승인 필요 subject + fact + citations 표시 session / location
custom-tool 승인 필요 도구명 + 인자 표시 session만 location 미지원

4.2 SafetyAssessment 반환 구조

tree-sitter 파싱 결과는 다음 구조로 반환된다:

// 재구성된 SafetyAssessment 인터페이스
interface SafetyAssessment {
  result: "completed";
  commands: Array<{ identifier: string; readOnly: boolean }>;
  possiblePaths: string[];           // 파싱된 파일 경로
  possibleUrls: Array<{ url: string }>; // curl/wget 등의 URL
  hasWriteFileRedirection: boolean;  // > 또는 >> 포함
  canOfferSessionApproval: boolean;  // !hasPotentiallyConfusingConstructs
  hasDangerousExpansion: boolean;    // $(cmd) 또는 <(cmd) 포함
  warning?: string;                  // 파서 에러 시 메시지
}

5. PTY 터미널 추상화

5.1 terminal-base.js의 PTY 시스템

// terminal-base.js — PTY 터미널 (재구성)
class TerminalBase extends EventEmitter2 {
  pty;           // node-pty 인스턴스
  encoding;      // 문자 인코딩
  flowControl;   // XON/XOFF 흐름 제어

  constructor(options) {
    this.pty = spawn(options.shell, options.args, {
      name: options.termName,
      cols: options.cols || 80,
      rows: options.rows || 24,
      cwd: options.cwd,
      env: options.env,
    });

    // 흐름 제어 설정
    if (options.flowControl) {
      this.flowControl = {
        xon: "\x11",    // XON (DC1)
        xoff: "\x13",   // XOFF (DC3)
        enabled: true,
      };
    }
  }
}

5.2 Raw Mode 참조 카운트 (신뢰도 🟢 높음)

중첩된 raw mode 요청을 안전하게 관리한다:

// cleanup.js — Raw mode 안전한 중첩 관리
handleSetRawMode = (enable) => {
  if (enable) {
    if (this.rawModeEnabledCount === 0) {
      stdin.ref();
      stdin.setRawMode(true);
      stdin.addListener("readable", this.handleReadable);
    }
    this.rawModeEnabledCount++;
  } else {
    if (--this.rawModeEnabledCount === 0) {
      stdin.setRawMode(false);
      stdin.removeListener("readable", this.handleReadable);
      stdin.unref();
    }
  }
};

6. 키 바인딩 설정 다이얼로그

터미널에서 멀티라인 입력을 위한 Shift+Enter 키 바인딩을 설정하는 권한 다이얼로그:

// confirmation-dialog.js — 키 바인딩 설정
TerminalKeyBindingSetup({ logger, terminal, terminalName, onConfirm }) {
  return ConfirmationDialog({
    title: "Set up terminal for multi-line input support",
    body: [
      `Detected terminal ${terminalName} which supports multi-line input`,
      "by setting up a key binding for shift+enter.",
      "Would you like to add this key binding to your terminal configuration?"
    ],
    items: [{ label: "Yes", value: true }],
    escapeItem: { label: "No", value: false },
  });
}

7. 셸 타입 감지와 스크립트 안전성

// 1021__slash-promises.js — 셸 설정
function getShellConfig(options) {
  let shell = process.platform === "win32" ? Shell.powerShell : Shell.bash;
  
  if (options.enableScriptSafety) {
    shell = shell.withScriptSafetyAssessor(treeSitterAssessor);  // tree-sitter 기반
  } else {
    shell = shell.withScriptSafetyAssessor(noopAssessor);        // 모든 것을 readOnly: false
  }

  return shell;
}

// noop assessor — 안전성 검사 없음 (폴백)
const noopAssessor = async (shellType, command) => ({
  result: "completed",
  commands: [{ identifier: command, readOnly: false }],
  possiblePaths: [],
  possibleUrls: [],
  hasWriteFileRedirection: false,
  canOfferSessionApproval: false,
  hasDangerousExpansion: false,
});

enableScriptSafety가 비활성이면 모든 명령이 readOnly: false, canOfferSessionApproval: false로 처리된다.

5개 에이전트 대비 비교

특성 Copilot CLI Codex Gemini CLI Claude Code OpenCode
OS 격리 ❌ 없음 🔒 Seatbelt/bwrap/RestrictedToken 🔒 Seatbelt/bwrap/RestrictedToken 🔒 sandbox-exec/bwrap ❌ 없음
네트워크 제한 ❌ 없음 🔒 seccomp/방화벽 🔒 정책 기반 🔒 프록시 필터링 ❌ 없음
명령 분류 tree-sitter AST 분석 is_known_safe_command + Starlark isKnownSafeCommand 화이트리스트 Allow/Deny 없음 (sandbox 의존) BashArity prefix
승인 모델 3-tier (once/session/location) 5종 (Never~Granular) 4종 (default/autoEdit/yolo/plan) sandbox + dangerouslyDisable 3종 (allow/deny/ask)
폴더 신뢰 ✅ 명시적 다이얼로그 ❌ (sandbox로 대체) ❌ (sandbox로 대체) ❌ (sandbox로 대체) ❌ (경로 비교)
셸 파서 tree-sitter (bash/PowerShell) 없음 (Starlark 규칙) tree-sitter 기반 commandSafety 없음 tree-sitter (160+ arity)
세션 권한 ✅ session + location ❌ (없음) ✅ persistent approval ❌ (sandbox 수준) ✅ always 누적

핵심 모듈 맵

모듈 역할 신뢰도
1021__slash-promises.js tree-sitter 명령 파서, readOnly 판정, 위험 확장 감지, URL 추출 ★★★
1718__LGt.js 승인 다이얼로그 (shell/write/mcp/memory/custom-tool/hook) ★★★
1025__workspace-context.js Zod 스키마 기반 권한 입력/출력 타입 정의 ★★★
confirm_folder_trust.js 폴더 신뢰 확인 다이얼로그 ★★★
terminal-base.js PTY 터미널 추상화 (node-pty, XON/XOFF) ★★★
cleanup.js Raw mode 참조 카운트 관리 ★★★
0662__pty-shell-session.js PTY 셸 세션 관리, 권한 요청 전파 ★★★
confirmation-dialog.js Ink 기반 확인 다이얼로그 프레임워크 ★★★

핵심 파일 목록

  • 151_copilot_cli/decoded/01_core/1021__slash-promises-this-todo-ide-tools-sql-login-github-json-docs.js
  • 151_copilot_cli/decoded/02_session/1718__LGt.js
  • 151_copilot_cli/decoded/03_agents/runtime/1025__workspace-context.js
  • 151_copilot_cli/decoded/01_core/tui/modals/confirm_folder_trust.js
  • 151_copilot_cli/decoded/01_core/shell/0662__pty-shell-session.js

포크 관점

  • tree-sitter 기반 명령 파싱은 정규식보다 훨씬 정확한 보안 판정을 제공한다
  • 3-tier 승인 모델 (once/session/location)은 승인 피로를 효과적으로 줄인다
  • canOfferSessionApproval의 조건부 표시는 복합 명령에 대한 보수적 접근이다
  • PERSISTED_PERMISSIONS 피처 플래그로 영구 승인을 점진적으로 배포한다
  • readOnly + hasDangerousExpansion 이중 판정은 false positive를 줄인다
  • raw mode 참조 카운트는 안전한 중첩 관리의 좋은 패턴
  • OS 샌드박스 없음은 보안 관점에서 근본적 약점
  • PowerShell ScriptBlock이 포함되면 모든 판정을 포기 (readOnly: false)
  • tree-sitter WASM 로딩 실패 시 보수적 폴백이 작동하지만, 보안 가시성은 떨어짐

이전 문서: [[06_cp_surface]] 다음 문서: [[08_cp_config]]

snapshot_to_current 델타

Area Snapshot Current
Axis surface Paths cited in-body APIs/flags evolve per release — re-verify on upgrade
Host delegation Documented in this checkout Binary-only drift for closed-source CLIs

변경 기록

  • 2026-03-26: Copilot CLI 샌드박스를 7가지 권한 종류, PTY 기반 터미널, 디렉토리 기반 권한 다이얼로그로 초기 분석.
  • 2026-03-26: tree-sitter 기반 명령 파서 심층 분석 추가 — readOnly 분류 체계(40+ 명령), 위험 확장 감지, 환경변수 위험 판정, 3-tier 승인 모델(once/session/location), 폴더 신뢰 모델, SafetyAssessment 구조, 셸 타입 감지, MCP·메모리·custom-tool·hook 승인 분석. 소스 코드 스니펫 15개, Mermaid 다이어그램 2개 추가.
30

Axis 08: Config system

AXIS

008_config-system/08_cp_config.md

Overview

Axis 08: Config system — developer-depth section from the codex corpus. Structural highlights extracted from the analysis:

  • 분석 스냅샷: 151_copilot_cli/ — configuration system.

  • ⚠️ 역공학 분석: configure-copilot.agent.yaml, MCP 설정 스키마, decoded/07_config/ 내 설정 관련 모듈 13개, deobfuscated/src/app/config/settings/store.js (65KB) + store__1563.js (11KB), 그리고 marketplace.js (21KB)의 역공학 분석이다. 난독화된 심볼명은 패턴 기반 추정이며

  • Copilot CLI의 설정은 3계층 MCP-중심 설정 (user/project/workspace), JSON 기반 설정 스토어 (ir 싱글톤), configure-copilot AI 에이전트 (설정 자동화), GitHub Marketplace 통합 (플러그인 생태계)의 4축 구조다. 설정 변경 후 mcp_validate → mcp_reload 2단계 검증 흐름이 강제되며, 플러그인 설치
  • graph TD
  • subgraph ConfigSources["설정 소스 계층"]
  • UserConfig["User Config~/.config/copilot/mcp-config.json{mcpServers: {...}}"]
  • ProjectConfig["Project Config.mcp.json{servers: {...}}"]
  • WorkspaceConfig["Workspace Config.vscode/mcp.json{servers: {...}}"]
  • ClaudeSettings[".claude/settings.jsonextraKnownMarketplaces"]
  • end
  • subgraph SettingsStore["설정 스토어 (ir 싱글톤)"]
  • StoreLoad["ir.load(context)JSON 읽기"]

README / docs

// deobfuscated/src/app/config/settings/store__1563.js (재구성)
// ir = BPe(schema.parse, "config-filename")
// BPe 팩토리 패턴:
//   .load(context)  → JSON 파일 읽기 + Zod 파싱
//   .write(data, prefix, context)  → JSON 직렬화 + 파일 쓰기

README / docs

// store__1563.js — 명령 히스토리 Zod 스키마
const historySchema = z.object({ commandHistory: z.array(z.string()) });
const historyStore = BPe(historySchema.parse, "command-history");

class CommandHistory {
  commandHistory = [];     // 최대 50개 유지
  historyIndex = -1;       // 현재 탐색 위치
  isNavigatingHistory = false;
  unSubmittedCommand = null;
  shellPrefix = undefined;  // "!" 접두사 필터
  excludePrefix = undefined;

  async addCommand(cmd) {
    // 중복 제거 → 앞에 추가 → 50개 제한 → 저장
    this.commandHistory = this.commandHistory.filter(c => c !== cmd);
    this.commandHistory.unshift(cmd);
    this.commandHistory = this.commandHistory.slice(0, 50);
    await this.saveHistory();
  }

  searchHistory(query, startIndex = 0, options) {
    // 대소문자 무시 검색, requirePrefix/excludePrefix 필터링
    const lower = query.toLowerCase();
    for (let i = startIndex; i < this.commandHistory.length; i++) {
      const cmd = this.commandHistory[i];
      if (options?.requirePrefix && !cmd.startsWith(options.requirePrefix)) continue;
      if (options?.excludePrefix && cmd.startsWith(options.excludePrefix)) continue;
      if (cmd.toLowerCase().includes(lower)) return { index: i, command: cmd };
    }
    return null;
  }
}

README / docs

// store__1563.js — 출력 버퍼
class OutputBuffer {
  static MAX_PARTIAL_LENGTH = 64 * 1024;  // 64KB 부분 라인 제한
  lines = [];
  linesDropped = 0;
  partial = "";

  append(text) {
    const parts = (this.partial + text).split('\n');
    this.partial = parts.pop();
    for (const line of parts) this.lines.push(line);
    // 부분 라인이 64KB 초과 시 강제 라인 분리
    if (this.partial.length > OutputBuffer.MAX_PARTIAL_LENGTH) {
      this.lines.push(this.partial);
      this.partial = "";
    }
    // maxLines 초과 시 앞에서 제거
    if (this.lines.length > this.maxLines) {
      const excess = this.lines.length - this.maxLines;
      this.lines.splice(0, excess);
      this.linesDropped += excess;
    }
  }

  snapshot() {
    // 드롭된 라인 수 표시 + 현재 라인 + partial 결합
    const prefix = this.linesDropped > 0
      ? truncationNotice("output", "lines", this.linesDropped, "start")
      : "";
    const all = this.partial ? [...this.lines, this.partial] : this.lines;
    return prefix + all.join('\n');
  }
}

README / docs

// 치환 패턴 (재구성)
// 1. 단순 변수: $VAR_NAME → process.env.VAR_NAME
// 2. 기본값 포함: ${VAR_NAME:-default_value} → 미설정 시 default_value
// 3. 입력 변수: ${input:id} → 프로젝트/워크스페이스별 동적 입력값

// User config 예시
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "my-server": {
      "command": "npx",
      "args": ["-y", "@my-org/mcp-server"],
      "env": {
        "API_KEY": "$MY_API_KEY",           // 단순 변수
        "PORT": "${PORT:-3000}",             // 기본값 포함
        "TIMEOUT": "${TIMEOUT:-30000}"
      }
    }
  }
}

// Project config 예시 — ${input:id}로 프로젝트 포터블
{
  "servers": {
    "project-server": {
      "command": "node",
      "args": ["./mcp-server.js"],
      "env": {
        "DB_URL": "${input:database_url}",   // 입력 변수
        "SECRET": "${input:api_secret}"
      }
    }
  }
}

README / docs

graph TD
    WS["① Workspace (.vscode/mcp.json)<br/>최우선"] --> MERGE["설정 병합"]
    PJ["② Project (.mcp.json)"] --> MERGE
    US["③ User (~/.config/copilot/mcp-config.json)<br/>최하위"] --> MERGE
    MERGE --> VALIDATE["mcp_validate<br/>(스키마 검증)"]
    VALIDATE -->|"에러"| FIX["수정 후 재검증"]
    FIX --> VALIDATE
    VALIDATE -->|"성공"| RELOAD["mcp_reload<br/>(런타임 적용)"]
    RELOAD --> CONNECT["서버 연결 확인"]

README / docs

// store__1563.js — 기본 마켓플레이스 (재구성)
const BUILT_IN_MARKETPLACES = {
  "copilot-plugins": {
    source: { source: "github", repo: "github/copilot-plugins" },
  },
  "awesome-copilot": {
    source: { source: "github", repo: "github/awesome-copilot" },
  },
};

README / docs

// store__1563.js — 소스 타입 해석 (X6r 함수 재구성)
function resolveMarketplaceSource(request, basePath) {
  switch (request.source) {
    case "directory":
      // 로컬 디렉터리: 절대/상대 경로 지원
      return { source: "local", path: path.isAbsolute(request.path)
        ? request.path : path.resolve(basePath, request.path) };
    case "git":
      // Git URL: url + optional ref (브랜치/태그)
      return { source: "url", url: request.url, ref: request.ref };
    case "github":
      // GitHub 리포: repo (owner/name) + optional ref
      return { source: "github", repo: request.repo, ref: request.ref };
  }
}

README / docs

graph TD
    A["플러그인 spec 파싱<br/>(github:owner/repo, marketplace:name/plugin, url:...)"] --> B{"이미 설치?"}
    B -->|"installed & enabled"| C["already_installed"]
    B -->|"installed & disabled"| D["enabled=true로 변경"]
    B -->|"미설치"| E{"spec 타입?"}
    E -->|"github/url/local"| F["installFromRepo()"]
    E -->|"marketplace"| G{"마켓플레이스 존재?"}
    G -->|"Yes"| H["installFromMarketplace()"]
    G -->|"No"| I["failed: Marketplace not found"]
    D --> J["ir.write(updated_plugins)"]
    F --> J
    H --> J

README / docs

// store__1563.js — 플러그인 토글 (L6r 함수 재구성)
async function togglePlugin(plugin, enable, settings, context) {
  const current = await ir.load(context);
  const updated = (current.installed_plugins || []).map(p =>
    p.name === plugin.name && p.marketplace === plugin.marketplace
      ? { ...p, enabled: enable }
      : p
  );
  await ir.write({ ...current, installed_plugins: updated }, "", context);
}

README / docs

// store__1563.js — Claude 설정에서 마켓플레이스 읽기 (H6r 함수 재구성)
function readClaudeMarketplaces(projectRoot) {
  if (!projectRoot) return {};
  const settingsPath = path.join(projectRoot, ".claude", "settings.json");
  if (!fs.existsSync(settingsPath)) return {};
  
  const data = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(settingsPath, "utf-8"));
  const extra = data.extraKnownMarketplaces;
  // 각 마켓플레이스 소스를 directory/git/github 타입으로 해석
  const result = {};
  for (const [name, entry] of Object.entries(extra)) {
    const resolved = resolveMarketplaceSource(entry.source, projectRoot);
    if (resolved) result[name] = { source: resolved };
  }
  return result;
}

README / docs

# configure-copilot.agent.yaml
name: configure-copilot
model: claude-haiku-4.5
description: "MCP 서버 설정을 자동으로 수행하는 전용 에이전트"

README / docs

sequenceDiagram
    participant User as 사용자
    participant Agent as configure-copilot
    participant FS as 파일 시스템
    participant MCP as MCP 런타임

    User->>Agent: "Postgres MCP 서버 추가해줘"
    Agent->>FS: view(mcp-config.json)
    FS-->>Agent: 현재 설정
    Agent->>FS: edit(mcp-config.json, 새 서버 추가)
    Agent->>MCP: mcp_validate(mcp-config.json)
    alt 스키마 검증 실패
        MCP-->>Agent: 에러 상세
        Agent->>FS: edit(mcp-config.json, 수정)
        Agent->>MCP: mcp_validate(재검증)
    end
    MCP-->>Agent: 검증 성공
    Agent->>MCP: mcp_reload()
    MCP-->>Agent: 서버 연결 확인
    Agent-->>User: "Postgres MCP 서버 추가 완료"

Main analysis

Copilot CLI setup system analysis

Analysis Snapshot: 151_copilot_cli/ — configuration system.

⚠️ Reverse engineering analysis: 13 configuration-related modules in configure-copilot.agent.yaml, MCP configuration schema, decoded/07_config/, deobfuscated/src/app/config/settings/store.js (65KB) + store__1563.js (11KB), and marketplace.js (21KB) 역공학 분석이다. Obfuscated symbol names are pattern-based guesses and may be somewhat uncertain.

The configuration of Copilot CLI is a four-axis structure of 3-layer MCP-centric configuration (user/project/workspace), JSON-based configuration store (ir singleton), configure-copilot AI agent (configuration automation), and GitHub Marketplace integration (plug-in ecosystem). After changing the settings, the two-step verification flow of mcp_validate → mcp_reload is forced, and plugin installation/activation is managed atomically by JSON write through the installed_plugins array.

graph TD
    subgraph ConfigSources["설정 소스 계층"]
        UserConfig["User Config<br/>~/.config/copilot/mcp-config.json<br/>{mcpServers: {...}}"]
        ProjectConfig["Project Config<br/>.mcp.json<br/>{servers: {...}}"]
        WorkspaceConfig["Workspace Config<br/>.vscode/mcp.json<br/>{servers: {...}}"]
        ClaudeSettings[".claude/settings.json<br/>extraKnownMarketplaces"]
    end

    subgraph SettingsStore["설정 스토어 (ir 싱글톤)"]
        StoreLoad["ir.load(context)<br/>JSON 읽기"]
        StoreWrite["ir.write(data, prefix, context)<br/>JSON 쓰기"]
        Plugins["installed_plugins[]<br/>name, marketplace, enabled, source"]
    end

    subgraph ConfigAgent["configure-copilot 에이전트"]
        Agent["configure-copilot.agent.yaml<br/>claude-haiku-4.5"]
        Validate["mcp_validate<br/>(스키마 검증)"]
        Reload["mcp_reload<br/>(런타임 적용)"]
    end

    subgraph Marketplace["Marketplace 레지스트리"]
        BuiltIn["Built-in Marketplaces<br/>copilot-plugins, awesome-copilot"]
        Extra["extraKnownMarketplaces<br/>(Claude settings)"]
        Custom["사용자 정의 소스<br/>github/url/local"]
    end

    subgraph Templates["변수 치환 시스템"]
        ConfigDir["{{configDir}}"]
        CWD["{{cwd}}"]
        Schema["{{mcpSchema}}"]
        InputVar["${input:id}"]
        EnvVar["$VAR / ${VAR:-default}"]
    end

    UserConfig --> StoreLoad
    ProjectConfig --> Agent
    WorkspaceConfig --> Agent
    ClaudeSettings -->|extraKnownMarketplaces| Marketplace
    Agent --> Validate
    Validate --> Reload
    Marketplace --> Plugins
    StoreLoad --> Plugins
    InputVar --> ProjectConfig
    EnvVar --> UserConfig

1. Settings store internal structure

1.1 ir singleton — JSON configuration manager

The ir object in settings/store.js (65KB) is responsible for CRUD of all settings. The BPe() factory function takes a Zod schema and a file name and creates a type-safe configuration store:

// deobfuscated/src/app/config/settings/store__1563.js (재구성)
// ir = BPe(schema.parse, "config-filename")
// BPe 팩토리 패턴:
//   .load(context)  → JSON 파일 읽기 + Zod 파싱
//   .write(data, prefix, context)  → JSON 직렬화 + 파일 쓰기

Key fields in configuration data:

  • installed_plugins — Array of installed plugins (name, marketplace, enabled, source)
  • extraKnownMarketplaces — define additional marketplaces
  • marketplaces — Marketplace source registry
  • commandHistory — Command history (separate store, maximum 50)

1.2 Command History Store

The commandHistory dedicated store is separate from the settings store:

// store__1563.js — 명령 히스토리 Zod 스키마
const historySchema = z.object({ commandHistory: z.array(z.string()) });
const historyStore = BPe(historySchema.parse, "command-history");

class CommandHistory {
  commandHistory = [];     // 최대 50개 유지
  historyIndex = -1;       // 현재 탐색 위치
  isNavigatingHistory = false;
  unSubmittedCommand = null;
  shellPrefix = undefined;  // "!" 접두사 필터
  excludePrefix = undefined;

  async addCommand(cmd) {
    // 중복 제거 → 앞에 추가 → 50개 제한 → 저장
    this.commandHistory = this.commandHistory.filter(c => c !== cmd);
    this.commandHistory.unshift(cmd);
    this.commandHistory = this.commandHistory.slice(0, 50);
    await this.saveHistory();
  }

  searchHistory(query, startIndex = 0, options) {
    // 대소문자 무시 검색, requirePrefix/excludePrefix 필터링
    const lower = query.toLowerCase();
    for (let i = startIndex; i < this.commandHistory.length; i++) {
      const cmd = this.commandHistory[i];
      if (options?.requirePrefix && !cmd.startsWith(options.requirePrefix)) continue;
      if (options?.excludePrefix && cmd.startsWith(options.excludePrefix)) continue;
      if (cmd.toLowerCase().includes(lower)) return { index: i, command: cmd };
    }
    return null;
  }
}

1.3 Output buffer system

The Bpt class manages command output line by line. The maxLines limit and partial line handling are key:

// store__1563.js — 출력 버퍼
class OutputBuffer {
  static MAX_PARTIAL_LENGTH = 64 * 1024;  // 64KB 부분 라인 제한
  lines = [];
  linesDropped = 0;
  partial = "";

  append(text) {
    const parts = (this.partial + text).split('\n');
    this.partial = parts.pop();
    for (const line of parts) this.lines.push(line);
    // 부분 라인이 64KB 초과 시 강제 라인 분리
    if (this.partial.length > OutputBuffer.MAX_PARTIAL_LENGTH) {
      this.lines.push(this.partial);
      this.partial = "";
    }
    // maxLines 초과 시 앞에서 제거
    if (this.lines.length > this.maxLines) {
      const excess = this.lines.length - this.maxLines;
      this.lines.splice(0, excess);
      this.linesDropped += excess;
    }
  }

  snapshot() {
    // 드롭된 라인 수 표시 + 현재 라인 + partial 결합
    const prefix = this.linesDropped > 0
      ? truncationNotice("output", "lines", this.linesDropped, "start")
      : "";
    const all = this.partial ? [...this.lines, this.partial] : this.lines;
    return prefix + all.join('\n');
  }
}

2. MCP configuration file structure

2.1 File format and key system

tier file path root key variable reference
User {{configDir}}/mcp-config.json mcpServers $VAR, ${VAR:-default}
Project .mcp.json servers ${input:id}
Workspace .vscode/mcp.json servers ${input:id}

Key difference: User config uses the mcpServers key, Project/Workspace uses the servers key. This asymmetry is a similar historical decision to Claude Code's pluginConfigs → .claude/settings.json.

2.2 Environment variable substitution details

// 치환 패턴 (재구성)
// 1. 단순 변수: $VAR_NAME → process.env.VAR_NAME
// 2. 기본값 포함: ${VAR_NAME:-default_value} → 미설정 시 default_value
// 3. 입력 변수: ${input:id} → 프로젝트/워크스페이스별 동적 입력값

// User config 예시
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "my-server": {
      "command": "npx",
      "args": ["-y", "@my-org/mcp-server"],
      "env": {
        "API_KEY": "$MY_API_KEY",           // 단순 변수
        "PORT": "${PORT:-3000}",             // 기본값 포함
        "TIMEOUT": "${TIMEOUT:-30000}"
      }
    }
  }
}

// Project config 예시 — ${input:id}로 프로젝트 포터블
{
  "servers": {
    "project-server": {
      "command": "node",
      "args": ["./mcp-server.js"],
      "env": {
        "DB_URL": "${input:database_url}",   // 입력 변수
        "SECRET": "${input:api_secret}"
      }
    }
  }
}

2.3 Setting priority

graph TD
    WS["① Workspace (.vscode/mcp.json)<br/>최우선"] --> MERGE["설정 병합"]
    PJ["② Project (.mcp.json)"] --> MERGE
    US["③ User (~/.config/copilot/mcp-config.json)<br/>최하위"] --> MERGE
    MERGE --> VALIDATE["mcp_validate<br/>(스키마 검증)"]
    VALIDATE -->|"에러"| FIX["수정 후 재검증"]
    FIX --> VALIDATE
    VALIDATE -->|"성공"| RELOAD["mcp_reload<br/>(런타임 적용)"]
    RELOAD --> CONNECT["서버 연결 확인"]

3. Marketplace integration system

3.1 Built-in Marketplace

Two default marketplaces hardcoded in the source code:

// store__1563.js — 기본 마켓플레이스 (재구성)
const BUILT_IN_MARKETPLACES = {
  "copilot-plugins": {
    source: { source: "github", repo: "github/copilot-plugins" },
  },
  "awesome-copilot": {
    source: { source: "github", repo: "github/awesome-copilot" },
  },
};

3.2 Marketplace source type

Three source types are supported, each with different interpretation logic:

// store__1563.js — 소스 타입 해석 (X6r 함수 재구성)
function resolveMarketplaceSource(request, basePath) {
  switch (request.source) {
    case "directory":
      // 로컬 디렉터리: 절대/상대 경로 지원
      return { source: "local", path: path.isAbsolute(request.path)
        ? request.path : path.resolve(basePath, request.path) };
    case "git":
      // Git URL: url + optional ref (브랜치/태그)
      return { source: "url", url: request.url, ref: request.ref };
    case "github":
      // GitHub 리포: repo (owner/name) + optional ref
      return { source: "github", repo: request.repo, ref: request.ref };
  }
}

3.3 Plugin installation flow

graph TD
    A["플러그인 spec 파싱<br/>(github:owner/repo, marketplace:name/plugin, url:...)"] --> B{"이미 설치?"}
    B -->|"installed & enabled"| C["already_installed"]
    B -->|"installed & disabled"| D["enabled=true로 변경"]
    B -->|"미설치"| E{"spec 타입?"}
    E -->|"github/url/local"| F["installFromRepo()"]
    E -->|"marketplace"| G{"마켓플레이스 존재?"}
    G -->|"Yes"| H["installFromMarketplace()"]
    G -->|"No"| I["failed: Marketplace not found"]
    D --> J["ir.write(updated_plugins)"]
    F --> J
    H --> J

Enabling/disabling a plugin toggles the enabled field in the installed_plugins array and stores it atomically with ir.write():

// store__1563.js — 플러그인 토글 (L6r 함수 재구성)
async function togglePlugin(plugin, enable, settings, context) {
  const current = await ir.load(context);
  const updated = (current.installed_plugins || []).map(p =>
    p.name === plugin.name && p.marketplace === plugin.marketplace
      ? { ...p, enabled: enable }
      : p
  );
  await ir.write({ ...current, installed_plugins: updated }, "", context);
}

3.4 Claude Settings integration

Copilot CLI registers additional marketplaces by reading extraKnownMarketplaces in .claude/settings.json. This is designed for ecosystem cross-compatibility with Cloud Code:

// store__1563.js — Claude 설정에서 마켓플레이스 읽기 (H6r 함수 재구성)
function readClaudeMarketplaces(projectRoot) {
  if (!projectRoot) return {};
  const settingsPath = path.join(projectRoot, ".claude", "settings.json");
  if (!fs.existsSync(settingsPath)) return {};
  
  const data = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(settingsPath, "utf-8"));
  const extra = data.extraKnownMarketplaces;
  // 각 마켓플레이스 소스를 directory/git/github 타입으로 해석
  const result = {};
  for (const [name, entry] of Object.entries(extra)) {
    const resolved = resolveMarketplaceSource(entry.source, projectRoot);
    if (resolved) result[name] = { source: resolved };
  }
  return result;
}

Final Marketplace Registry Merge Order:

  1. extraKnownMarketplaces in Claude settings (lowest)
  2. marketplaces in user settings (middle)
  3. Built-in (copilot-plugins, awesome-copilot) (top level)

4. configure-copilot AI agent

4.1 Agent Definition

# configure-copilot.agent.yaml
name: configure-copilot
model: claude-haiku-4.5
description: "MCP 서버 설정을 자동으로 수행하는 전용 에이전트"

4.2 Agent toolchain

tools Use Verification Step
bash Execute shell commands (server verification, etc.) —
view Read configuration file —
edit Modify existing settings mcp_validate required
create Create a new configuration file mcp_validate required
glob File navigation —
grep text search —
mcp_validate MCP Settings JSON Schema Validation Required
mcp_reload Restart/reconnect MCP server process Required

4.3 Verification flow details

sequenceDiagram
    participant User as 사용자
    participant Agent as configure-copilot
    participant FS as 파일 시스템
    participant MCP as MCP 런타임

    User->>Agent: "Postgres MCP 서버 추가해줘"
    Agent->>FS: view(mcp-config.json)
    FS-->>Agent: 현재 설정
    Agent->>FS: edit(mcp-config.json, 새 서버 추가)
    Agent->>MCP: mcp_validate(mcp-config.json)
    alt 스키마 검증 실패
        MCP-->>Agent: 에러 상세
        Agent->>FS: edit(mcp-config.json, 수정)
        Agent->>MCP: mcp_validate(재검증)
    end
    MCP-->>Agent: 검증 성공
    Agent->>MCP: mcp_reload()
    MCP-->>Agent: 서버 연결 확인
    Agent-->>User: "Postgres MCP 서버 추가 완료"

5. Template variable system

variable scope Use
{{configDir}} agent User settings directory path (~/.config/copilot)
{{cwd}} agent Current working directory
{{mcpSchema}} agent MCP Server JSON Schema Definition
{{serverNamePattern}} agent Server Name Validation Pattern
${input:id} Project/Workspace Runtime Dynamic Inputs (Project Portable)
$VAR / ${VAR:-default} User Expanding environment variables

6. Other settings

6.1 Color Mode

Settings value default
colorMode "default", "dim", "high-contrast", "colorblind" "default"

6.2 Content Exclusion

Excludes specific files/directories from AI analysis through glob matching similar to the .gitignore pattern. content-exclusion.js (893 bytes) implements this logic, and exclusion patterns are managed in the configuration store or project settings.

6.3 LSP settings

There are 9 LSP-related configuration modules in the decoded/07_config/lsp/ directory. They are responsible for connecting to the Language Server, configuring it, and interpreting file-specific settings:

module Role
0697__config.js LSP server default settings
0718__config.js LSP client settings
0724__config.js LSP function settings
0726__config.js LSP diagnostic settings
1436__config.js LSP initialization parameters
1614__config.js LSP Workspace Settings
1669__config.js LSP Document Settings
1689__config.js LSP formatter settings
1706__config.js LSP autocomplete settings

7. Creative elements of Copilot CLI setup

  1. AI agent-based configuration: The only system in which the configuration change itself is performed by an AI agent (configure-copilot)
  2. Enforce two-step verification: Runtime safety is guaranteed by sequential execution of mcp_validate → mcp_reload
  3. Marketplace Ecosystem: Distributed management of plugins via GitHub repo, URL, and local directory.
  4. Claude cross-compatibility: Share ecosystem by reading extraKnownMarketplaces in .claude/settings.json
  5. ${input:id} variable: Runtime input binding for project portable settings.

Technical Reference

Comparison of 5 agents

Characteristics Copilot CLI Codex Gemini CLI Claude Code OpenCode
Settings Format JSON TOML JSONC JSON JSONC
Number of layers 3 (user/project/workspace) 7 (6 config + requirements) 5 (system→user→workspace) 5 (user→policy) 6 (+remote+managed)
Merge Strategy priority overwrite recursive TOML merge + constraint per-key merge strategy deep-merge + array union mergeDeep + concat
settings agent AI Agent (Unique) CLI only CLI only Config tool SDK CLI only
Marketplace GitHub integration (only) — Extensions Plugins Plugins
variable substitution $VAR, ${input:id} — resolveEnvVarsInObject() env key {env:VAR}, {file:path}
Cross Compatible Read Claude settings — — — —

List of core files

file size Role
deobfuscated/src/app/config/settings/store.js 65KB main config store (ir)
deobfuscated/src/app/config/settings/store__1563.js 11KB Command history, output buffer, marketplace interpretation
deobfuscated/src/app/config/marketplace.js 21KB Marketplace UI and Installation Workflow
deobfuscated/src/app/config/content-exclusion.js 893B Content exclusion pattern
npm-package/definitions/configure-copilot.agent.yaml — Settings Agent Definition
decoded/07_config/lsp/ 9files LSP-related configuration modules
deobfuscated/src/app/config/onCancel.js 12KB Cancellation processing and organization
deobfuscated/src/app/config/slash-heads.js 32KB Slash command definition

Reuse seam

  • 3-tier settings (user/project/workspace) can be applied universally
  • mcp_validate → mcp_reload 2-step verification is a safe configuration change pattern
  • Environment variable expansion ($VAR, ${VAR:-default}) is standard.
  • ${input:id} variable reference is useful for project portable settings
  • Claude extraKnownMarketplaces Cross-reading see Ecosystem Integration
  • maxLines/partial handling of output buffer (Bpt) is a general purpose CLI pattern.
  • Setting-only AI agents incur AI call costs, so a trade-off is required
  • Only 3 layers exist, so there is no enterprise/MDM control
  • Difficult to debug settings due to lack of per-key origin tracking
